![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Remote/Ahmedabad/Pune
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. SSE/TL ServiceNow Developer


**No. Of Positions** : 1  
**Location** : Remote/Ahmedabad/Pune  
**Experience** : 5+ Years  
**Job Description** :
  * Consult internal customers on industry and ServiceNow best practices
  * Lead and own all technical aspects of project delivery and solution delivery, including Application UI Configuration and Workflow Configuration
  * Implement the range of products offered by ServiceNow
  * Develop Custom Applications
  * Integration Development
  * Develop the portal, pages, widgets, and other components based on requirements
  * Be a key member of the overall implementation project team
  * Drive the continuous improvements of our implementation methodology and service offerings based on customer experiences


**Requirements  
**
**Must have:**
  * 5+ years of experience in ServiceNow implementations and software development
  * Expertise in writing JavaScript code
  * Experience in developing UI pages with JavaScript, Angular/React
  * Familiarity with REST APIs and integrations
  * Expertise with UI technologies including HTML, CSS, and AJAX practices
  * Expertise in developing Service Portal, pages, widgets, UI Builder, and other components based on requirements
  * Strong interpersonal skills, customer-centric attitude, and ability to deal with cultural diversity
  * Strong communication skills (both written and verbal)
  * Strong Data Structure & Algorithm knowledge.


**Good to have:**
  * Work experience in CMDB, ITSM, SPM, and SecOps modules
  * Demonstrated aptitude for learning new technologies quickly
  * Experience as a key technical resource leading the development of solutions
  * Worked on Agile-based projects and comfortable with DevOps-based deployments

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

sections.content:
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2057%2057'%3E%3C/svg%3E) Author [Crest Data](https://www.crestdata.ai/author/admin/ "Posts by Crest Data")

sections.heading: Ahmedabad
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. Technical Sales Engineer


**No. Of Positions** : 1  
**Location** : Ahmedabad  
**Experience** :  
**Job Description** :
  * Act as a technical advisor during the sales cycle, supporting discovery calls, solutioning, and technical validations.
  * Understand customer requirements and map them to appropriate technical solutions and services.
  * Deliver technical presentations, demos, workshops, and proof-of-concepts to customers.
  * Collaborate with sales teams to create proposals, solution architectures, and effort estimates.
  * Build credibility with customer engineering, security, and operations teams.
  * Support RFP/RFI responses with strong technical inputs.
  * Stay up to date with industry trends, technologies, and competitive offerings
  * Provide feedback from the field to internal product and delivery teams.


**Requirements**
  * 4–5 years of experience in an engineering, consulting, SRE, DevOps, security, or platform-focused role.
  * Strong fundamentals in at least one of the following domains:  
Security (SIEM, SOAR, SOC, Cloud Security, etc.)
  * Observability / Monitoring
  * Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)  
DevOps / SRE / Platform Engineering
  * Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences
  * Strong presentation and storytelling skills  
Comfortable interacting with customers, including senior technical stakeholders
  * Willingness and motivation to move into a technical sales / pre-sales role
  * Prior experience in customer-facing roles (consulting, support, solutions engineering, pre-sales)
  * Exposure to SaaS products and enterprise customers
  * Experience working with tools like Splunk, Datadog, Dynatrace, Elastic, cloud-native tools, or security platforms
  * Certifications in cloud or security technologies
  * Basic understanding of sales cycles, deal qualification, and value-based selling

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: We accelerate and automate security operations and incident resolution by orchestration of security resources and integrating disparate security systems on SOAR Platforms.
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. Managed Security Orchestration, Automation, and Response (SOAR) Services

sections.heading: Our SOAR Services
sections.content:
We help Security Operation Centers (SOC) to configure, customize and manage four key components of SOAR defined by Gartner that enable enterprises respond to incidents more effectively.
![](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/apply-kill-chain-methodology.png)

sections.heading: Security Orchestration
sections.content:
Our SOAR experts provide orchestration services to integrate disparate security specific and non-security specific technologies, setup use case specific workflows, so that they can function together to ease coordination and decision making.
We help enterprises to integrate SOAR platforms like Splunk Phantom with other security solutions in a way that lets them “pull” data and also “push” proactive actions, build a unified interface that allows analysts to easily define actions on security tools and IT systems without being experts in those systems or their APIs.

sections.heading: Security Automation
sections.content:
We help Enterprises to integrate SOAR tools to automate repetitive tasks and workflows and free-up experienced analysts to focus on critical investigations and do proactive threat hunting.
With the right configurations and deployment, SOAR tools allow security teams to define standardized automation steps and a decision-making workflow, with enforcement, status tracking and auditing capabilities.
Having an experience of working on 200+ security automation implementations, Crest Data can help build use case specific security playbooks, which analysts code using a visual UI or a programming language like Python to automate the SoC operations.
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20950%20584'%2F%3E)
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20952%20585'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Incident Management and Collaboration
sections.content:
Our services are not confined to only automation and orchestration of security operations, but also fosters team collaboration and build confidence that enterprises execute tasks and decisions on examined, relevant threat intelligence.
In addition, we also help security teams manage security incidents, collaborate and share data to resolve the incident efficiently. Our capabilities include:
  * Alert Processing and Triage: Correlate data to identify priority and criticality, and automatically generates incidents for investigation
  * Incident Management- Record threats, incidents, historical responses and decisions, and their outcomes
  * Management of Threat Intelligence: Bring in threat data from open-source databases, industry leaders, coordinated response organizations, and commercial threat intelligence providers.

sections.heading: Start Your Journey with Us
sections.content:
Ready to transform your ideas into reality? Get in touch with our experts today and explore how we can partner for your success.
[ Get started  ](https://www.crestdata.ai/contact/)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Leverage Innovative Enterprise Migration Services Engineered for Secured and Seamless Transitions
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. Security and Observability Migrations

sections.heading: Inclusive Migration Services for Enterprises
sections.content:
Enterprises need to keep pace with changing technologies and platforms to keep their solution offerings agile, competitive, and scalable. However, migrating critical enterprise security, application and observability data is prone to risks like extended downtime, schema incompatibility, data loss, and more. 
Crest Data provides comprehensive enterprise migration services and purpose-build AI-driven tools that facilitate effortless transitions between various data analysis, and monitoring tools, with a focus on observability and security analytics use-cases. As a part of the migration strategy consulting, our expert team can help you create an optimized migration strategy ensuring robust data integrity, security, and scalability keeping your business ahead in the digital transformation race.
![Data Migration-updated](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Data-Migration-updated.jpg)

sections.heading: Why Crest for Enterprise Migrations?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Accelerated Time-to-Value via Proprietary Automation ](https://www.crestdata.ai/migrations/#collapse-2411)
sections.content: AI-driven migration engine to eliminate the manual efforts required for large scale migrations. Enterprises can witness improved migration efficiency with reduction in man-days required in migration efforts thereby achieving a **57% faster time-to-value and cost saving.**

sections.heading: [ High-Precision Migration at Enterprise Scale ](https://www.crestdata.ai/migrations/#collapse-2412)
sections.content: Robust migration services help enterprises handle huge volumes of data without compromising the integrity of the data. Crest Data has successfully migrated over **3000+ dashboard** and alerts preserving complex monitoring logic.

sections.heading: [ Rapid Deployment and Minimal Business Disruption ](https://www.crestdata.ai/migrations/#collapse-2413)
sections.content: Efficient end-to-end migration services ensure **60% reduction** in downtime as entire manual processes are replaced by intelligent infrastructure automation.

sections.heading: [ Embedded Security and Continuous Compliance ](https://www.crestdata.ai/migrations/#collapse-2414)
sections.content: Stringent security practices and continuous compliance measures are adopted that ensures data integrity and security is maintained during the enterprise data migration process. Crest upholds **100% encryption of sensitive files** in transit and at rest, resulting in zero compliance breaches during high-stakes data exchanges.

sections.heading: Splunk to Datadog
sections.content:
Unlock seamless transition of your monitoring and logging data from Splunk to Datadog with an automation-driven approach that strictly adheres to highest standards of data integrity and security. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-datadog-migration/)

sections.heading: Splunk to Dynatrace
sections.content:
Simplifies and accelerates enterprise migration from Splunk to Dynatrace via automation, expert-level resources and future-proof flexibility that evolves with customer needs.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-dynatrace-migrations/)

sections.heading: Splunk to Amazon CloudWatch
sections.content:
Effortlessly transition your observability data from Splunk to Amazon CloudWatch with a direct and secure transfer process that minimizes downtime.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-amazon-cloudwatch-migration)

sections.heading: New Relic to Datadog
sections.content:
The New Relic to Datadog Migration Platform is an innovative Application designed to facilitate the seamless migration of visualizations from New Relic to Datadog. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/new-relic-to-datadog-migration)

sections.heading: Splunk to Elastic
sections.content:
Unlock the potential of your data analytics by seamlessly migrating your visualizations from Splunk to Elastic with our state-of-the-art Migration Platform. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-elastic-migration-app)

sections.heading: Elasticsearch to Splunk
sections.content:
Automate your migration from Elasticsearch to Splunk with zero-touch dashboards, real-time tracking, reduced costs and error-free performance by Crest Data. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/elastic-search-to-splunk-migration)

sections.heading: Splunk To Microsoft Sentinel
sections.content:
Seamlessly migrate from Splunk to Microsoft Sentinel — automate dashboards, queries & visualizations with Crest Data’s conversion engine, billed on success. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-microsoft-sentinel-migration-platform)

sections.heading: Microsoft Sentinel to Any platform
sections.content:
Easily migrate from Microsoft Sentinel to Splunk with Crest Data, be it automated dashboards, accurate data conversion and transparent billing based on your success. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/microsoft-sentinel-to-splunk-migration)

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:

sections.heading: [ What is New Relic and what does it do? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/new-relic-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-1231)
sections.content:
New Relic is a cloud observability platform that provides application performance monitoring (APM), infrastructure monitoring, log management, browser monitoring, and synthetic monitoring, all within a unified telemetry data platform. It uses NRQL (New Relic Query Language) for data exploration and offers flexible data ingestion from a wide range of sources.
New Relic is a mature, capable platform used by thousands of engineering and DevOps teams worldwide. When organizations decide to transition their New Relic environment to Datadog for reasons specific to their team, architecture, or business requirements. Crest Data handles the migration with full fidelity, converting NRQL queries, dashboards, and alert policies into their Datadog equivalents automatically.

sections.heading: [ Is New Relic free, and how is it priced? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/new-relic-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-1232)
sections.content:
New Relic has a free plan that gives you 100GB of data to play with every month, and you also get one full-platform user for free. This means smaller teams or people just trying out the service can use all of New Relic's features without paying a dime. If you need more than what the free plan offers, New Relic's pricing is pretty straightforward - you pay based on how much data you use, measured in gigabytes, and how many full-platform users you have. This way, teams can easily scale up or down as they need to, without having to worry about surprise costs.
When you're thinking of switching from New Relic to Datadog, it's really important to understand how each platform charges for its services, especially considering how much data you have and how big your team is. To help with this, Crest Data does a special exercise to figure out the costs, which is part of their migration planning process, so you can make a decision that's right for you.

sections.heading: [ What are the main observability platforms considered alongside New Relic? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/new-relic-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-1233)
sections.content:
When companies look at how to keep an eye on their systems, they consider a few top choices - like New Relic, Datadog, Dynatrace, Splunk Observability Cloud, and Elastic. Each of these options has its own set of features, ways it can be set up, and pricing plans that fit different types of companies and their technology setups.
We have a lot of experience with many different platforms at Crest Data. We can help you move your data from one platform to another, no matter which ones you are using. Our approach is flexible, so we can help you with your migration no matter what platform you want to use. We don't prefer one vendor over another, our goal is to make sure your migration is done correctly and completely.

sections.heading: [ Can my New Relic dashboards and NRQL queries be automatically converted to Datadog? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/new-relic-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-1234)
sections.content:
Crest Data's migration tool makes it easy to switch from New Relic to Datadog. It automatically converts New Relic dashboards and queries into Datadog format. The tool knows how to change different types of charts and tables from New Relic into the same types of charts and tables in Datadog. It also translates the query language from New Relic into the language used by Datadog, including things like filters, aggregations, and faceting. This means you can easily move your data and queries from one platform to the other without having to start from scratch.
When you move to a new system, we make sure to transfer your alert policies and notification channels too. This way, you won't have to worry about setting up your monitoring configuration all over again. We also give you a detailed report after the migration, which shows how well the transfer went and points out any issues that our engineers need to look at manually. This report helps us figure out what worked well and what didn't, so we can make the transition as smooth as possible.

sections.heading: [ How does the New Relic to Datadog migration process work? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/new-relic-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-1235)
sections.content:
Crest Data's New Relic to Datadog migration follows a structured five-phase process:
  1. **Assessment —** We inventory your New Relic environment, cataloguing all dashboards, alert policies, NRQL queries, and data sources.
  2. **Mapping -** this is where we match each part of New Relic with the similar part in Datadog. We also look for complicated items that need a specialist to review them.
  3. **Automated Conversion -** Our system can automatically convert a lot of things for you, like dashboards, queries, and alerts, all at the same time. This means your team won't have to spend as much time doing it manually.
  4. **Validation —** Converted assets are tested side-by-side with the source environment to verify accuracy and completeness.
  5. **Go-Live —** We support the cutover with a parallel-run period to ensure full continuity before decommissioning the New Relic environment.


The whole thing usually takes somewhere between 3 to 6 weeks, but it really depends on how complicated everything is. If you're interested, just get in touch with us and we can set up a free call to figure out what you need.
