sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: End-to-End Enterprise AI Solutions Across Data, AI Models, and Autonomous Systems Delivering Measurable AI Outcomes
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

sections.heading: Artificial intelligence is becoming foundational to modern enterprise and security operations,
sections.content:
enabling organizations to pull insights from large data volumes, automate decision-making, and respond to threats and operational challenges in real time. As AI adoption accelerates across security, IT, and business workflows, enterprises face growing complexity in moving from experimentation to reliable, production-scale solutions. 
Crest Data specializes in helping enterprises turn AI ambition into real-world outcomes through end-to-end AI and machine learning solutions spanning data preparation, model development, deployment, governance, and continuous optimization. We build secure, scalable, and responsible AI solutions including Generative AI, AI Agents, and enterprise ML platforms designed for real-world use. With deep expertise across security, retail, financial services, and automotive domains, our AI specialists combine advanced AI frameworks, cloud-native architectures, and human-in-the-loop designs to ensure trust, compliance, performance, and measurable ROI at enterprise scale while accelerating AI capability development for enterprises.
![AI and ML](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Agentic-AI.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for AI-driven Solutions?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Proven Enterprise Impact ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8571)
sections.content: Delivered AI automation services reducing alert fatigue by **40%** , false positives by **67%** , and investigation time by **50%** across large enterprises.

sections.heading: [ Faster Time to Value ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8572)
sections.content: Production‑ready AI agents and GenAI systems delivered in **weeks,** through structured AI prototyping services for enterprises.

sections.heading: [ Deep Domain Expertise ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8573)
sections.content: Delivered custom AI use-case development across security, finance, retail, automotive, and DevSecOps with industry‑specific models and workflows.

sections.heading: [ Responsible & Secure AI ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8574)
sections.content: Human‑in‑the‑loop frameworks, compliance‑ready architectures, and support for air‑gapped and connected environments.

sections.heading: [ Scalable at Enterprise Scale ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8575)
sections.content: Created over **500,000** high‑quality labeled datasets and MLOps platforms supporting global deployments.

sections.heading: [ Measurable ROI ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8576)
sections.content: Clients achieved up to **42% improvement** in model accuracy and **30% reduction** in operational escalations.

sections.heading: Agentic AI
sections.content:
We deliver AI agent development services by designing and implementing Agentic AI solutions and AI Agents that perceive context, reason autonomously, and act across enterprise environments. These intelligent systems automate complex workflows, operate continuously, and significantly augment human productivity across security, IT, and business operations. Built using modern agent frameworks such as LangGraph, LlamaIndex, and CrewAI, our Agentic AI solutions integrate seamlessly with enterprise APIs, tools, and internal platforms, enabling secure and production-ready autonomous workflows.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-agents/)

sections.heading: Generative AI
sections.content:
Our Generative AI solutions enable enterprises to unlock new capabilities through conversational AI, intelligent chatbots, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, fine-tuned large language models, and robust guardrails. From rapid proofs of concept to enterprise-grade deployments, we build context-aware, secure, and compliant Generative AI solutions designed to integrate seamlessly with existing workflows and scale reliably across the organization.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/generative-ai/)

sections.heading: Machine Learning
sections.content:
We deliver end-to-end machine learning and AI development services that transform business challenges into production-ready solutions. Our offerings span use-case discovery, data engineering, custom model development, and enterprise deployment, with a strong focus on reliability. We build domain-specific ML models using Supervised Learning (labeled data), Unsupervised Learning (finding hidden patterns), or Reinforcement Learning (trial and error). Validate the model for accuracy and precision and then deploy it in the application.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/)

sections.heading: Data Annotation
sections.content:
We provide enterprise-grade data annotation and annotation services designed to power high-performance AI and machine learning models. This includes domain-specific data preprocessing, large-scale annotation services, and custom-built annotation pipelines tailored to complex use cases such as security logs, threat detection, and operational data. With quality assurance and human verification at every stage, we ensure consistently high-quality labeled datasets that improve model accuracy and reduce false positives.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/data-labeling-services/)

sections.heading: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
sections.content:
We design scalable MCP architectures tailored to enterprise environments, ensuring seamless integration across diverse systems and tools, and write MCP clients and servers that act like a universal connector, enabling LLMs to securely access your files, databases, and APIs without the need to rewrite code for every new model or platform. This reduces integration complexity while maintaining strong governance and control, and allows AI systems to dynamically discover and interact with tools for more efficient and scalable enterprise operations.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mcp-solution/)

sections.heading: Agentic Workflows
sections.content:
We design and implement AI-led workflows that coordinate tasks, decisions, and system interactions across complex enterprise environments. Our Agentic Workflow solutions focus on workflow orchestration, task delegation, multi-step execution, and exception handling, enabling organizations to automate end-to-end business and operational processes. By embedding policy controls, auditability, and human approvals at critical stages, we ensure workflows remain transparent and reliable. These workflows integrate seamlessly with enterprise platforms such as ticketing systems, security tools, and internal applications driving faster execution and consistent outcomes across high-volume operations. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/)
[](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/)

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve enterprise operations using AI-led intelligence? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8831)
sections.content: Crest Data combines AI, observability, automation, and operational analytics to help enterprises improve incident detection, reduce operational noise, automate workflows, strengthen operational visibility, and improve decision-making across cloud and infrastructure environments.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide enterprise AI automation services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8832)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data delivers AI-led automation solutions that help enterprises automate operational workflows, incident management, service operations, document processing, and enterprise decision-making across cloud and distributed environments.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data develop AI agents and agentic workflows? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8833)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data builds AI-native agents and agentic workflows that can analyze operational context, interact with enterprise systems, automate multi-step tasks, and support intelligent decision-making across IT, observability, security, and enterprise operations.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support AI integration with enterprise platforms and cloud ecosystems? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8834)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI and ML capabilities with enterprise platforms and cloud ecosystems including ServiceNow, Datadog, Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud, to improve operational intelligence, automation, and enterprise scalability.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises operationalize and scale machine learning environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8835)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises implement scalable MLOps environments with automated model deployment, monitoring, governance, retraining workflows, and cloud-native ML infrastructure designed for long-term operational reliability and scalability.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other enterprise AI and ML service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8836)
sections.content: Crest Data combines AI-native engineering, observability expertise, automation, cloud-native architecture, MLOps, and deep enterprise platform integration capabilities to help organizations build scalable AI systems that operate reliably in real production environments.

sections.heading: [ What is Model Context Protocol (MCP), and how does it help enterprise AI? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8837)
sections.content: Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables AI systems to securely connect with enterprise applications, databases, APIs, documents, and tools through a standardized framework. This reduces integration complexity and allows AI agents to access real-time business information while maintaining governance and security controls.

sections.heading: [ How can AI help improve cybersecurity and security operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ai-and-ml/#collapse-8838)
sections.content: AI can automate threat detection, reduce alert fatigue, accelerate investigations, identify anomalies, prioritize incidents, and improve response efficiency. Crest Data has delivered AI-powered security solutions that significantly reduce false positives and improve operational effectiveness.

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: As an Amazon Web Services Advanced Services Partner, with the AWS Cloud Operations Competency in Monitoring and Observability,
sections.content:
Crest Data delivers enterprise-grade Amazon CloudWatch services and strategic AWS CloudWatch solutions across complex cloud ecosystems. We help DevOps, SRE, and security teams unify operational, security, and compliance data into a single intelligent data plane. Leveraging AI-driven automation, a proprietary AI-led migration engine, and deep multi-platform expertise, we reduce migration timelines and costs by up to 60% while minimizing risk. From accelerated migrations and production-grade implementations to custom integrations and fully managed services, we ensure real-time visibility, proactive threat detection, and optimized cloud performance.
Download Datasheet

sections.heading: [ AWS Cloud Operations Competency (Monitoring & Observability) ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-2091)
sections.content: Recognized among the top **0.1%** of AWS partners for proven cloud operations excellence.

sections.heading: [ 100+ Successful Migrations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-2092)
sections.content: Proven expertise in enterprise-scale CloudWatch observability solutions, accelerating modernization with structured governance and measurable outcomes.

sections.heading: [ Up to 60% Faster & More Cost-Effective Migrations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-2093)
sections.content: AI-led migration engine automates up to **90%** of dashboard and alert conversions.

sections.heading: [ Multi-Vendor Integration Expertise Across 300+ Technologies ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-2094)
sections.content: Deep experience delivering CloudWatch integration services across AWS, Azure, GCP, Datadog, Dynatrace, Splunk, Elastic, QRadar, and other leading observability and security platforms.

sections.heading: [ Reduced Risk, Zero Disruption Approach ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-2095)
sections.content: Dual-ingestion pipelines and structured validation ensure seamless production cutover.

sections.heading: [ End-to-End Ownership ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-2096)
sections.content: From strategy and architecture to optimization and financial governance, we manage the complete CloudWatch lifecycle.

sections.heading: Migration
sections.content: We deliver accelerated, low-risk Amazon CloudWatch services designed to modernize legacy monitoring platforms. Our migration engine automates up to 90% of dashboard and alert conversions, reducing timelines and costs by up to 60%. We implement dual-ingestion pipelines to preserve historical continuity and ensure smooth cutover. With experience across 100+ migrations, we minimize disruption, eliminate overlapping platform spend, and ensure complete workflow parity before production transition.

sections.heading: Implementation
sections.content: We deploy Amazon CloudWatch in production environments with a focus on observability maturity, SLI/SLO governance, and DevOps alignment. Our approach integrates business-critical metrics while strengthening operational visibility. On the security front, we enable proactive threat detection using Logs Insights and anomaly detection. Automated compliance workflows, long-term log retention, and structured validation ensure a resilient, audit-ready, and performance-optimized observability ecosystem built for enterprise scale.

sections.heading: Custom Integration Development
sections.content: We design and develop custom CloudWatch integrations to ingest, normalize, and analyze data from proprietary and third-party systems. Leveraging our AI-driven development engine, we rapidly build custom agents and transform telemetry into standardized formats such as OCSF and OpenTelemetry. Our services enable real-time ingestion pipelines, advanced analytics, dashboards, and alarms tailored for operational and security use cases. This structured development model ensures long-term CloudWatch performance optimization with automated QA and lifecycle ownership.

sections.heading: Managed Services
sections.content: We provide end-to-end managed services for Amazon CloudWatch, assuming full operational ownership of your environment. Our team delivers 24/7 monitoring, optimization, performance tuning, access control, and financial governance through budgets and chargeback models. We continuously enhance observability coverage, enforce compliance standards, and optimize cost efficiency. Through automation and AI-driven insights, we reduce operational overhead while ensuring your CloudWatch environment remains secure, resilient, and aligned with evolving business objectives.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises optimize existing Amazon CloudWatch environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1971)
sections.content:
Several businesses use only a fraction of CloudWatch's capabilities or struggle with excessive alerts, fragmented dashboards, and growing monitoring costs.
Crest Data helps assess and optimize existing CloudWatch environments by improving monitoring coverage, alerting strategies, dashboard design, log visibility, and operational workflows so teams can get more value from their AWS observability investment.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide Amazon CloudWatch assessments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1972)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data offers CloudWatch assessments to evaluate monitoring maturity, observability gaps, alert effectiveness, dashboard usability, operational visibility, and cost efficiency across AWS environments.
The outcome is a practical roadmap for improving reliability, operational efficiency, and cloud observability.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve alerting and incident response in CloudWatch? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1973)
sections.content:
Poorly configured alerts can overwhelm operations teams and make it harder to identify critical issues.
Crest Data helps organizations design alerting strategies that align with business priorities, service dependencies, and operational workflows. This helps reduce unnecessary noise while improving incident detection and response times.

sections.heading: [ Can Crest Data help reduce Amazon CloudWatch monitoring costs? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1974)
sections.content:
Yes. As AWS environments grow, CloudWatch costs can increase significantly due to excessive log ingestion, unnecessary custom metrics, and inefficient monitoring configurations.
Crest Data helps organizations optimize telemetry collection, retention policies, dashboard usage, and monitoring strategies to improve visibility while controlling observability costs.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data build custom CloudWatch dashboards for enterprise operations teams? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1975)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data designs role-based CloudWatch dashboards that provide meaningful visibility for engineering, operations, SRE, and leadership teams.
Rather than displaying raw metrics, the focus is on surfacing actionable operational insights that help teams make faster and better decisions.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data support CloudWatch for AWS modernization initiatives? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1976)
sections.content:
As organizations modernize applications and move toward cloud-native architectures, monitoring requirements become more complex.
Crest Data helps enterprises extend CloudWatch visibility across containers, Kubernetes, serverless workloads, microservices, and hybrid AWS environments to support modernization efforts without losing operational control.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide ongoing Amazon CloudWatch managed services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1977)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data provides ongoing CloudWatch support including monitoring administration, dashboard management, alert tuning, operational reviews, observability optimization, and reliability-focused managed services.
This allows internal teams to focus on business priorities while maintaining a healthy observability environment.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other Amazon CloudWatch service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch/#collapse-1978)
sections.content: Crest Data combines AWS expertise, observability engineering, SRE, and operational automation to help organizations get measurable business value from CloudWatch. Rather than focusing only on tool implementation, we help customers improve operational visibility, strengthen reliability, optimize monitoring costs, and build scalable AWS observability practices that grow with their business.

With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Machine learning service by Amazon Web Services, streamlining the
sections.content:
end-to-end process from data preprocessing to model deployment
  1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. AWS SageMaker

sections.heading: Enabling Seamless and Cost-Effective Machine Learning Operations
sections.content:
Harness the power of AWS SageMaker with Crest Data. Our Offering combines Crest Datas’ expertise with the advanced capabilities of SageMaker, enabling Organizations to efficiently manage the end-to-end lifecycle of their machine learning projects.
With a focus on collaboration, automation, and scalability, Crest Data’s MLOps offerings on AWS SageMaker empower businesses to realize the full potential of their machine learning initiatives.
![AWS Sagemaker](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/AWS-Sagemaker.webp)

sections.heading: Unified Data Preparation and Exploration
sections.content: Crest Data leverages SageMaker Data Wrangler to facilitate seamless data preparation and exploration. By simplifying data cleaning, transformation, and visualization, data scientists and analysts can efficiently create high-quality datasets without extensive coding efforts.

sections.heading: Enhanced Model Development and Training
sections.content: Integrate with SageMaker Studio, empowering data scientists to experiment with various algorithms and hyperparameters. With automatic model tuning, models can be optimized for performance automatically, reducing the time and resources required for hyperparameter optimization.

sections.heading: Collaborative Version Control
sections.content: Enhance collaboration through seamless integration with version control systems like Git. This ensures that changes made to code, notebooks, and model artifacts are tracked, enabling teams to work together efficiently while maintaining a clear audit trail.

sections.heading: Streamlined Model Deployment
sections.content: Utilizing SageMaker Endpoints, Crest Data facilitates the deployment of trained models as RESTful APIs. This allows Customers to quickly integrate machine learning models into their production environments for real-time predictions.

sections.heading: CI/CD Integration for Automation
sections.content: Seamlessly integrate with AWS CodePipeline and other CI/CD tools. This enables automated end-to-end workflows, ensuring that model training, testing, and deployment processes are streamlined and consistent.

sections.heading: Proactive Monitoring and Performance Management
sections.content: Incorporate SageMaker’s monitoring capabilities, allowing teams to proactively monitor deployed models. By tracking model drift and evaluating performance, enable teams to identify and address issues promptly, ensuring models maintain accuracy over time.

sections.heading: Robust Security and Compliance
sections.content: Crest Data prioritizes data security and compliance. Leveraging SageMaker’s encryption, access controls, and integration with AWS security services, we ensure that sensitive data is protected and regulatory requirements are met.

sections.heading: Effortless Model Retraining and Updates
sections.content: As new data becomes available, Crest facilitates seamless model retraining. Customers can ensure their models remain up-to-date and relevant without disrupting existing workflows

sections.heading: Model Governance and Auditability
sections.content: Crest Data incorporates features for model lineage tracking, change auditing, and maintaining a comprehensive record of development and deployment activities. This fosters accountability and transparency throughout the ML lifecycle.

sections.content:

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

sections.heading: Delivering Resilient Cloud Infrastructure Services for Enterprise Transformation
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Cloud and Infrastructure

sections.heading: As enterprises embark on a digital transformation journey,
sections.content:
there is a strong need to have a solid, scalable and resilient cloud infrastructure to provide seamless, intuitive and personalized customer experience. Our cloud infrastructure services cover a broad spectrum of offerings including cloud transformation, enterprise app integrations and migrations, and managed services. These offerings, combined with efficient SRE, enables enterprises to achieve greater agility, improve system reliability at significantly lower costs.
Leveraging our proven expertise, our team of expert engineers utilize advanced cloud technologies and AI-infused methodologies. We help enterprises choose the optimal infrastructure configuration to accelerate their business growth. This allows them to focus on their core business objectives with confidence. 
![Cloud and Infrastructure](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Cloud-and-Infrastructure-min-1024x682.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest for Cloud and Infrastructure Services?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Unparalleled High Availability and Resilience ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-8571)
sections.content: Utilizing our expertise in cloud architecture consulting services, we design optimal cloud architectures improving platform availability and high-availability from **90% to 99.99%.**

sections.heading: [ Significant Infrastructure and Operational Cost Savings ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-8572)
sections.content: Our enterprise cloud transformation services help enterprises migrate from on-premise systems to robust cloud ecosystems resulting in **30–40% cost savings** through reserved instances, autoscaling, and consolidated billing.

sections.heading: [ Enterprise-Grade Security and Continuous Compliance ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-8573)
sections.content: Laying strong emphasis on data integrity and security, we ensure security is embedded into infrastructure, achieving **100% encryption** of sensitive files at rest and at transit.

sections.heading: [ Rapid Provisioning and Accelerated Time-to-Market ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-8574)
sections.content: Through robust cloud infrastructure management, manual bottlenecks can be reduced thereby reducing the provisioning cycle by **85%**(from 6–8 hours down to under 60 minutes).

sections.heading: Comprehensive Cloud Solutions
sections.content:
Our comprehensive suite of cloud infrastructure services encompasses cloud migration, CloudOps, and managed IT service management (ITSM) to advanced artificial intelligence for IT operations (AIOps). With a focus on maximizing return on investment (ROI) across multi-cloud and hybrid-cloud platforms, we ensure your business is cloud-competent, resilient, and agile.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloudops/)

sections.heading: Managed Services
sections.content:
Our comprehensive managed services extend beyond traditional IT support, offering comprehensive monitoring, alerting, security, and automation. Whether it's managing your security operations center (SOC), orchestrating security through SOAR platforms, or ensuring the constant availability of applications through CloudOps managed services, we are your partner in maintaining an optimal cloud environment.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/managed-security-orchestration-automation-and-response-soar-services/)

sections.heading: Migrations
sections.content:
Crest Data provides a nuanced approach to cloud migration, emphasizing minimal downtime and optimized resource utilization. Our methodology spans assessment, planning, execution, and post-migration optimization to ensure a smooth transition to cloud platforms like AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, and more. We prioritize operational excellence, security, reliability, performance efficiency, and cost optimization at every step.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/cloud-migration/)

sections.heading: AI-SRE
sections.content:
Our enterprise SRE services help build and operate reliable and scalable systems by implementing AI-driven availability monitoring, alert notifications, automated security risk detection and response, and automated remediation. Supported by AI-led toil reduction, our services help enterprises focus on growth, achieve business objectives, and deliver exceptional customer experience with maximum uptime and optimal performance of critical systems.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/)

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises modernize cloud and infrastructure environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7341)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises modernize infrastructure through cloud-native architectures, automation, observability, and DevOps-driven operations. The focus is on improving scalability, reliability, and operational efficiency without disrupting critical business systems.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support multi-cloud and hybrid cloud environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7342)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data works across hybrid and multi-cloud environments including Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud to help enterprises improve infrastructure flexibility, operational visibility, and long-term scalability.

sections.heading: [ What cloud and infrastructure technologies does Crest Data specialize in? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7343)
sections.content: Crest Data specializes in Kubernetes, containerization, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), cloud-native infrastructure, CI/CD automation, observability, SRE, DevOps, hybrid cloud architecture, and infrastructure automation across enterprise environments.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve infrastructure reliability and operational performance? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7344)
sections.content: Crest Data combines observability, automation, SRE practices, and cloud-native operations to help enterprises reduce downtime, improve monitoring visibility, automate operational workflows, and strengthen infrastructure reliability at scale.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide infrastructure automation and DevOps services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7345)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises automate infrastructure provisioning, deployments, operational workflows, and CI/CD pipelines using DevOps and Infrastructure as Code practices to improve consistency, scalability, and operational efficiency.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises optimize cloud operations and infrastructure costs? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7346)
sections.content: Crest Data helps organizations improve cloud efficiency through infrastructure observability, workload optimization, automation, resource management, and operational analytics — helping enterprises scale cloud environments more efficiently without compromising reliability.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide ongoing cloud operations and managed infrastructure support? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7347)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data provides ongoing cloud operations support, infrastructure optimization, monitoring, automation, reliability engineering, and managed services to help enterprises maintain stable and scalable cloud environments over time.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other cloud and infrastructure service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/cloud-and-infrastructure/#collapse-7348)
sections.content: Crest Data combines cloud-native engineering, observability, DevOps, automation, AI-led operations, and enterprise-scale infrastructure expertise to help organizations modernize operations, improve reliability, and scale cloud environments more efficiently.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.

![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X
