![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

sections.heading: Crest Data is an Advanced Datadog partner
sections.content:
delivering end-to-end Datadog services, including Datadog consulting and implementation services, that help enterprises maximize the value of their Datadog investment. With 200+ integrations delivered, 100+ successful Datadog migrations and proven expertise across observability and security domains, we help organizations modernize monitoring through advanced observability services and monitoring solutions.
From building 60+ Datadog Marketplace integrations to enabling large-scale SIEM and SaaS integrations, our teams provide specialized Datadog integration services that combine automation, AI-driven engineering, and deep domain expertise to drive measurable business impact. Whether accelerating migrations from legacy platforms, optimizing platform costs, or providing 24×7 managed support, we ensure scalable, resilient, and cost-efficient Datadog environments tailored to enterprise needs.

sections.heading: Implementations
sections.content: We deliver end-to-end Datadog implementation services to help enterprises quickly deploy and operationalize the platform across observability, security, and digital experience use cases. Our experts implement APM, infrastructure monitoring, and log management while building scalable architectures aligned with enterprise needs. From agent deployment to Datadog dashboard development services, alert strategy, and observability-as-code adoption, enabling scalable and performance-optimized Datadog environments. Accelerating enterprise adoption through proven implementation best practices.

sections.heading: Migrations
sections.content: Our automated migration framework ensures seamless transitions from legacy platforms like Splunk, New Relic, and Elastic to Datadog. We provide comprehensive assessments, query translations, dashboard and alert conversions, pipeline restructuring, and RBAC configuration. Automation significantly reduces manual toil while ensuring data normalization and validation throughout the migration lifecycle. From phased rollouts to final cutover and optimization, we help organizations understand how to implement Datadog for enterprises while accelerating time-to-value through scalable Datadog monitoring solutions.

sections.heading: Integrations
sections.content: We design, develop, and maintain Datadog integrations across security, SaaS, infrastructure, cloud, AI/ML, and enterprise applications. With 60+ Marketplace integrations and 200+ SIEM/SaaS integrations delivered, we enable seamless ingestion, normalization, and visualization of telemetry across diverse environments. Our team handles integration development, upgrades, QA validation, customer support, and collaboration with Datadog engineering for certification and releases. We also build workflow blueprints and AppBuilder applications that accelerate automation, improve detection coverage, and enhance operational visibility across observability and security ecosystems.

sections.heading: Managed Services
sections.content: We deliver comprehensive Datadog managed services to ensure platform stability, performance optimization, and continuous value realization. Our services include onboarding, configuration, observability-as-code implementation, dashboard optimization, anomaly-based alerting, ingest monitoring, cost control strategies, and proactive platform governance. With 24x7 L1/L2 support and continuous tuning, we reduce alert fatigue, prevent ingest delays, improve resolution times, and enable self-service adoption across teams. Our managed services approach ensures operational resilience while allowing internal teams to focus on innovation and growth.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations maximize their Datadog investment? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1181)
sections.content:
Implementing Datadog is only the first step. The real value comes from turning telemetry into actionable insights that improve reliability, performance, and operational efficiency.
Crest Data helps organizations design, implement, optimize, and scale Datadog environments across infrastructure, applications, cloud platforms, Kubernetes, and security operations. Our focus is on helping teams gain better visibility, reduce operational complexity, and improve overall system reliability.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve observability across cloud-native environments with Datadog? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1182)
sections.content:
Modern environments generate telemetry across applications, containers, Kubernetes clusters, cloud services, APIs, and infrastructure.
Crest Data helps organizations unify metrics, logs, traces, and events within Datadog to provide end-to-end visibility across distributed environments. This enables faster troubleshooting, improved operational awareness, and better decision-making across engineering and operations teams.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI Observability services for Datadog? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1183)
sections.content:
Yes. As organizations deploy AI applications into production, visibility becomes critical for maintaining reliability and performance.
Crest Data helps organizations use Datadog to monitor AI workloads, model performance, inference latency, resource utilization, operational health, and application dependencies. This helps teams operate AI systems with greater confidence and operational control.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations implement LLM Observability with Datadog? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1184)
sections.content:
Large Language Model (LLM) applications introduce new operational challenges that traditional monitoring approaches were never designed to address.
Crest Data helps organizations establish visibility into LLM application performance, response quality, token consumption, latency, usage patterns, and operational reliability using Datadog's AI and observability capabilities.
To accelerate adoption, Crest Data also offers **LLM Observability Quick Start** and **Full Stack Observability Quick Start** services that help organizations rapidly deploy observability best practices, shorten implementation timelines, and gain actionable insights into AI-driven applications running in production.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations unify observability across cloud, applications, and AI workloads with Datadog? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1185)
sections.content:
Modern enterprises need visibility across infrastructure, applications, user experiences, and increasingly AI-driven services.
Crest Data helps organizations build a unified observability strategy using Datadog by connecting cloud environments, applications, Kubernetes workloads, logs, traces, and AI systems into a single operational view. This helps teams reduce blind spots, accelerate troubleshooting, and improve operational efficiency across the enterprise.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other Datadog service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1186)
sections.content:
Crest Data has been one of Datadog's earliest and most experienced partners, with deep expertise across observability, cloud operations, SRE, security, automation, and AI-led operations.
Beyond platform implementation, we help organizations build mature observability practices that improve reliability, accelerate incident response, optimize cloud operations, and support emerging AI and LLM workloads at scale.

sections.heading: [ Can Crest Data migrate from Splunk, New Relic, Dynatrace, AppDynamics, or other monitoring platforms to Datadog? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1187)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data provides migration services from leading observability and monitoring platforms, including Splunk, New Relic, Dynatrace, AppDynamics, Grafana, Elastic, Nagios, and custom monitoring solutions to Datadog.

sections.heading: [ Why do organizations choose Crest Data for Datadog integrations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/#collapse-1188)
sections.content:
Integrations are often the foundation of a successful observability strategy.
Crest Data has delivered hundreds of integrations across observability, security, cloud, and enterprise platforms, including dozens of Datadog Marketplace integrations. This experience helps organizations connect critical systems faster, improve visibility across their technology stack, and maximize the value of their Datadog investment.

Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Foster Agility Through DevOps and Automation Services Ensuring Faster Time-to-Market Product Delivery
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. DevOps & Automation

sections.heading: To stay competitive in this dynamic marketplace, enterprises must expedite product delivery.
sections.content:
Crest Data’s high-impact enterprise DevOps services help in optimizing the entire software development lifecycle by implementing DevOps best practices like continuous deployment, continuous integration, and continuous delivery.
We offer DevOps consulting services backed by a team with deep expertise in DevOps automation tools and practices. Our experience spans infrastructure configuration, proactive monitoring, reporting, and security, enabling enterprises to design and implement efficient, reliable, and scalable DevOps solutions.
By leveraging our managed DevOps services, we help enterprises through continuous support and optimizing their processes, helping accelerate the product development process for faster time-to-market with increased efficiency and at reduced costs.
![MLOPs Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/MLOPs-Solutions.png)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for DevOps & Automation?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Accelerated Time-to-Market and Agility ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1811)
sections.content: Leveraging our robust automation services, we help enterprises achieve **3x faster** application deployments and 60% reduction in deployment downtime by eliminating hindrances and shortcomings in CI/CD pipelines, release management and infrastructure provisioning that delay the deployment.

sections.heading: [ Enterprise-scale DevSecOps Maturity ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1812)
sections.content: Through our DevOps security services, we ensure that security and compliance is embedded inside the development pipeline, achieving **100% encryption** of sensitive files both in transit and at rest making sure that your products meet industry-grade security standards.

sections.heading: [ Operational Excellence and Reliability ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1813)
sections.content: Even after deployment, our managed services ensure **99.99% platform availability** and extreme resilience. Adopting automation-driven practices reduces **~70% of repetitive tasks** saving the operations team approximately **40 hours per month**. Enterprises can ensure high availability and close to zero downtime through multi-AZ architectures and automated failover configurations.

sections.heading: [ Significant Cost-Optimization ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1814)
sections.content: Robust cloud-native engineering strategies that includes autoscaling, reserved instances and consolidated billing ensure enterprise witness **30-40% costs savings** compared to traditional on-premises or self-managed infrastructure.

sections.heading: Our DevOps & Automation Expertise
sections.content: We manage the code base using robust version control tools like SVN, Git, CVS, and Mercurial that authenticate the access, maintain all revisions of files, automate the commit and facilitate version and tagging.

sections.heading: Source Code Management
sections.content: Our DevOps services help organizations implement secure and scalable source code management using modern Git-based workflows with platforms such as GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket. We design repository structures with role-based access control, structured branching strategies, and enforced code review practices, ensuring full traceability and seamless integration with CI/CD pipelines.

sections.heading: Continuous Integration
sections.content: Comprehensive DevOps automation services enable our team to enable reliable continuous integration by automating build and validation workflows using tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions and GitLab CI. Our CI pipelines run automated tests, static code analysis, and security checks for every code change, providing fast feedback and improving release stability.

sections.heading: SEIM
sections.content: We help small and large enterprises adopt, customize and manage analytics-driven security using an integrated SIEM platform to improve their security operations. Our comprehensive DevOps security services focuses on making security important in development pipelines, infrastructure configuration and more.

sections.heading: Test Automation and Performance Engineering
sections.content: We help organizations embed automated testing and performance validation into their DevOps workflows using frameworks such as Selenium, JUnit, and TestNG for functional and regression testing, and tools like JMeter and LoadRunner for performance and load testing. Security testing using platforms such as Burp Suite is integrated into CI/CD pipelines to ensure continuous quality and reliability across environments.

sections.heading: Configuration Management
sections.content: Our configuration management services ensure consistent and compliant system configuration across environments using automation tools such as Ansible, Puppet, Chef, and SaltStack. We automate configuration enforcement, detect and remediate configuration drift, and standardize operating systems and middleware to improve reliability and security at scale.

sections.heading: Cloud-Native Application Platforms
sections.content: Our solutions leverage modern cloud-native technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, along with ecosystem tools like Helm, Argo CD, and OpenShift, to build, deploy, and operate scalable microservices-based applications. We help organizations design container strategies, implement production-ready Kubernetes platforms, and automate application delivery pipelines to support resilient, cloud-native architectures.

sections.heading: Monitoring, Logging & Observability
sections.content: We help organizations implement monitoring, logging, and observability across applications and infrastructure to gain real-time operational visibility and faster incident response. Our DevOps services implement metrics and dashboards using Prometheus and Grafana, and centralized logging using cloud-native platforms such as Loki, alongside enterprise solutions like the ELK Stack and Splunk. We integrate observability into cloud-native and Kubernetes environments and configure alerts and dashboards to support stable and reliable application operations.

sections.heading: DevOps on AWS
sections.content: As an AWS Advanced Tier Partner with AWS Cloud Competency, Crest Data helps enterprises design, implement, and operate DevOps platforms on AWS using native services such as CodePipeline, CodeBuild, and CodeDeploy, combined with infrastructure-as-code tools like CloudFormation. Our services support container orchestration with EKS and ECS, serverless workloads using Lambda, and operational visibility through CloudWatch and CloudTrail to enable scalable, secure, and well-governed AWS environments.

sections.content:

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises accelerate software delivery and operational efficiency? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1091)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises improve software delivery through DevOps automation, cloud-native engineering, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure automation. The focus is on reducing operational bottlenecks, improving deployment consistency, and helping teams release software faster and more reliably.

sections.heading: [ What DevOps and automation services does Crest Data provide? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1092)
sections.content: Crest Data provides services across CI/CD implementation, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), cloud automation, Kubernetes operations, deployment automation, DevSecOps, observability integration, workflow automation, and enterprise DevOps transformation.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support cloud-native DevOps environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1093)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises modernize DevOps operations across Kubernetes, containers, microservices, hybrid cloud, and distributed cloud-native environments designed for scalability, reliability, and operational agility.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve deployment reliability and operational stability? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1094)
sections.content: Crest Data combines automation, observability, CI/CD practices, and operational monitoring to help enterprises reduce deployment risks, improve release consistency, strengthen infrastructure reliability, and minimize operational downtime.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and automation services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1095)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises automate infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, deployments, and operational workflows using Infrastructure as Code and automation-first engineering practices.

sections.heading: [ Which cloud and enterprise platforms does Crest Data support for DevOps operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1096)
sections.content: Crest Data works across enterprise cloud and operational ecosystems including Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, Kubernetes, and enterprise observability platforms like Datadog.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI-led automation and intelligent DevOps operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1097)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI-led operational intelligence into DevOps and automation environments to improve anomaly detection, operational visibility, deployment analysis, workflow automation, and infrastructure operations across modern enterprise ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other DevOps and automation service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1098)
sections.content: Crest Data combines DevOps, observability, AI-led operations, cloud-native engineering, automation, and SRE expertise to help enterprises modernize operations, improve delivery speed, and build more scalable and resilient infrastructure environments.

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

sections.heading: Foster Agility Through DevOps and Automation Services Ensuring Faster Time-to-Market Product Delivery
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. DevOps & Automation

sections.heading: To stay competitive in this dynamic marketplace, enterprises must expedite product delivery.
sections.content:
Crest Data’s high-impact enterprise DevOps services help in optimizing the entire software development lifecycle by implementing DevOps best practices like continuous deployment, continuous integration, and continuous delivery.
We offer DevOps consulting services backed by a team with deep expertise in DevOps automation tools and practices. Our experience spans infrastructure configuration, proactive monitoring, reporting, and security, enabling enterprises to design and implement efficient, reliable, and scalable DevOps solutions.
By leveraging our managed DevOps services, we help enterprises through continuous support and optimizing their processes, helping accelerate the product development process for faster time-to-market with increased efficiency and at reduced costs.
![MLOPs Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/MLOPs-Solutions.png)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for DevOps & Automation?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Accelerated Time-to-Market and Agility ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1811)
sections.content: Leveraging our robust automation services, we help enterprises achieve **3x faster** application deployments and 60% reduction in deployment downtime by eliminating hindrances and shortcomings in CI/CD pipelines, release management and infrastructure provisioning that delay the deployment.

sections.heading: [ Enterprise-scale DevSecOps Maturity ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1812)
sections.content: Through our DevOps security services, we ensure that security and compliance is embedded inside the development pipeline, achieving **100% encryption** of sensitive files both in transit and at rest making sure that your products meet industry-grade security standards.

sections.heading: [ Operational Excellence and Reliability ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1813)
sections.content: Even after deployment, our managed services ensure **99.99% platform availability** and extreme resilience. Adopting automation-driven practices reduces **~70% of repetitive tasks** saving the operations team approximately **40 hours per month**. Enterprises can ensure high availability and close to zero downtime through multi-AZ architectures and automated failover configurations.

sections.heading: [ Significant Cost-Optimization ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1814)
sections.content: Robust cloud-native engineering strategies that includes autoscaling, reserved instances and consolidated billing ensure enterprise witness **30-40% costs savings** compared to traditional on-premises or self-managed infrastructure.

sections.heading: Our DevOps & Automation Expertise
sections.content: We manage the code base using robust version control tools like SVN, Git, CVS, and Mercurial that authenticate the access, maintain all revisions of files, automate the commit and facilitate version and tagging.

sections.heading: Source Code Management
sections.content: Our DevOps services help organizations implement secure and scalable source code management using modern Git-based workflows with platforms such as GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket. We design repository structures with role-based access control, structured branching strategies, and enforced code review practices, ensuring full traceability and seamless integration with CI/CD pipelines.

sections.heading: Continuous Integration
sections.content: Comprehensive DevOps automation services enable our team to enable reliable continuous integration by automating build and validation workflows using tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions and GitLab CI. Our CI pipelines run automated tests, static code analysis, and security checks for every code change, providing fast feedback and improving release stability.

sections.heading: SEIM
sections.content: We help small and large enterprises adopt, customize and manage analytics-driven security using an integrated SIEM platform to improve their security operations. Our comprehensive DevOps security services focuses on making security important in development pipelines, infrastructure configuration and more.

sections.heading: Test Automation and Performance Engineering
sections.content: We help organizations embed automated testing and performance validation into their DevOps workflows using frameworks such as Selenium, JUnit, and TestNG for functional and regression testing, and tools like JMeter and LoadRunner for performance and load testing. Security testing using platforms such as Burp Suite is integrated into CI/CD pipelines to ensure continuous quality and reliability across environments.

sections.heading: Configuration Management
sections.content: Our configuration management services ensure consistent and compliant system configuration across environments using automation tools such as Ansible, Puppet, Chef, and SaltStack. We automate configuration enforcement, detect and remediate configuration drift, and standardize operating systems and middleware to improve reliability and security at scale.

sections.heading: Cloud-Native Application Platforms
sections.content: Our solutions leverage modern cloud-native technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, along with ecosystem tools like Helm, Argo CD, and OpenShift, to build, deploy, and operate scalable microservices-based applications. We help organizations design container strategies, implement production-ready Kubernetes platforms, and automate application delivery pipelines to support resilient, cloud-native architectures.

sections.heading: Monitoring, Logging & Observability
sections.content: We help organizations implement monitoring, logging, and observability across applications and infrastructure to gain real-time operational visibility and faster incident response. Our DevOps services implement metrics and dashboards using Prometheus and Grafana, and centralized logging using cloud-native platforms such as Loki, alongside enterprise solutions like the ELK Stack and Splunk. We integrate observability into cloud-native and Kubernetes environments and configure alerts and dashboards to support stable and reliable application operations.

sections.heading: DevOps on AWS
sections.content: As an AWS Advanced Tier Partner with AWS Cloud Competency, Crest Data helps enterprises design, implement, and operate DevOps platforms on AWS using native services such as CodePipeline, CodeBuild, and CodeDeploy, combined with infrastructure-as-code tools like CloudFormation. Our services support container orchestration with EKS and ECS, serverless workloads using Lambda, and operational visibility through CloudWatch and CloudTrail to enable scalable, secure, and well-governed AWS environments.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises accelerate software delivery and operational efficiency? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1091)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises improve software delivery through DevOps automation, cloud-native engineering, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure automation. The focus is on reducing operational bottlenecks, improving deployment consistency, and helping teams release software faster and more reliably.

sections.heading: [ What DevOps and automation services does Crest Data provide? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1092)
sections.content: Crest Data provides services across CI/CD implementation, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), cloud automation, Kubernetes operations, deployment automation, DevSecOps, observability integration, workflow automation, and enterprise DevOps transformation.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support cloud-native DevOps environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1093)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises modernize DevOps operations across Kubernetes, containers, microservices, hybrid cloud, and distributed cloud-native environments designed for scalability, reliability, and operational agility.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve deployment reliability and operational stability? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1094)
sections.content: Crest Data combines automation, observability, CI/CD practices, and operational monitoring to help enterprises reduce deployment risks, improve release consistency, strengthen infrastructure reliability, and minimize operational downtime.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and automation services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1095)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises automate infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, deployments, and operational workflows using Infrastructure as Code and automation-first engineering practices.

sections.heading: [ Which cloud and enterprise platforms does Crest Data support for DevOps operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1096)
sections.content: Crest Data works across enterprise cloud and operational ecosystems including Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, Kubernetes, and enterprise observability platforms like Datadog.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI-led automation and intelligent DevOps operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1097)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI-led operational intelligence into DevOps and automation environments to improve anomaly detection, operational visibility, deployment analysis, workflow automation, and infrastructure operations across modern enterprise ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other DevOps and automation service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dev-ops-services/#collapse-1098)
sections.content: Crest Data combines DevOps, observability, AI-led operations, cloud-native engineering, automation, and SRE expertise to help enterprises modernize operations, improve delivery speed, and build more scalable and resilient infrastructure environments.
