![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

sections.heading: Delivering AI-Enabled Dynatrace Services for Enterprise Observability

sections.heading: Reimagine AI-Driven Full-Stack Observability with Dynatrace
sections.content:
In today’s fast-moving digital landscape, achieving true full-stack observability is critical to maintaining application performance, reliability, and security. Crest Data partners with you to deliver a tailored, consultative Dynatrace approach, aligned to your business and technical goals, so every layer of your environment, from infrastructure and applications to digital experience and security, is fully monitored, correlated, and optimized.
With a proven track record of delivering complex Dynatrace implementations for some of the world’s largest enterprises, Crest Data reduces operational complexity, accelerates issue resolution, and gains actionable insights at scale, empowering your teams to focus on innovation and growth.
![Dynatrace](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Dynatrace.png)

sections.heading: Our Dynatrace Solutions
sections.content: Crest Data delivers end-to-end Dynatrace services that accelerate your observability journey. We enable seamless migration from legacy platforms, continuous optimization and management, and seamless integrations to deliver true full-stack observability, helping you drive performance excellence and maximize the value of your Dynatrace investment.

sections.heading: [ Implementations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-8571)
sections.content:
Deploy Dynatrace with Crest Data. To achieve unified observability, we prioritize the following strategic pillars:
  * **Service Level Governance:** Defining and implementing the right SLIs to successfully drive your critical SLOs.
  * **Observability Maturity:** Establishing clear strategies to transition your operations to proactive, data-driven observability.
  * **Business Alignment:** Integrating crucial business metrics and aligning your entire observability framework with DevOps best practices.

sections.heading: [ Migrations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-8572)
sections.content:
Migrate from legacy observability platforms to Dynatrace with 60% lower costs and timelines using our AI-driven Migration Engine. We provide highly skilled consultants to reduce timelines, mitigate risk, reduce costs and eliminate complexity.
  * **Accelerated Timelines:** Crest Data's migration engine automates up to 90% of dashboard and alert conversions, reducing timelines by 60%. Expert consultants with multi-platform expertise deliver end-to-end migrations faster and more efficiently.
  * **Reduced Risk:** The Crest Data team accurately transitions various observability workflows to Dynatrace, minimizing disruption.   

  * **Cost Savings:** Automation combined with expert resources shortens project timelines and minimizes overlapping spend, making migrations at least 60% more cost-effective than internal or generalist approaches.

sections.heading: [ Integrations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-8573)
sections.content:
Collect and analyze data from your custom sources into Dynatrace through Crest Data’s AI-driven integration services. Our services include development of:
  * **Custom agents** that collect and transform real-time data to simplify analysis and correlation [e.g. Open Telemetry (OTel), CNCF standards].
  * **Custom analytics** using Dynatrace dashboards and anomalies for operational purposes.

sections.heading: [ Managed Services ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-8574)
sections.content: Delegate operational ownership of Dynatrace to us. The Crest Data team assumes full operational ownership of the environment by driving adoption, data onboarding, access control, fine-tuning and implementing financial governance through monitoring and chargeback models.

sections.heading: What our clients say
sections.content: > _“As enterprises move away from traditional log management tools, having a migration path that is fast, scalable, and future-ready is critical. Through our collaboration with Crest Data, customers gain actionable insights that help streamline operations at scale. Dynatrace delivers true full-stack observability, and this partnership enables organizations to modernize with confidence.”_

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations accelerate time-to-value with Dynatrace? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-2671)
sections.content:
Deploying Dynatrace is only the beginning. The real challenge is configuring the platform to provide meaningful visibility across applications, infrastructure, cloud services, and business-critical systems.
Crest Data helps organizations accelerate adoption through implementation, onboarding, dashboard design, alerting strategies, and operational best practices. Our goal is to help teams realize value quickly and build an observability foundation that supports long-term growth.

sections.heading: [ Can Crest Data migrate from Datadog, Splunk, New Relic, AppDynamics, or other monitoring platforms to Dynatrace? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-2672)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps organizations modernize and consolidate observability platforms by migrating from legacy monitoring and APM tools to Dynatrace. Our team supports assessment, migration planning, dashboard and alert migration, operational transition, and platform optimization to help organizations reduce tool sprawl and accelerate value from Dynatrace.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations improve incident detection and root-cause analysis with Dynatrace? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-2674)
sections.content:
Dynatrace provides powerful observability capabilities, but getting meaningful operational outcomes requires the right monitoring strategy and platform configuration.
Crest Data helps organizations improve incident detection through intelligent alerting, service mapping, dependency visibility, and observability best practices. By leveraging Dynatrace's full-stack visibility, teams can identify root causes faster, reduce troubleshooting time, and improve operational response across complex environments.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations get more value from Dynatrace's AI-driven observability capabilities? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-2675)
sections.content:
Many organizations deploy Dynatrace but only use a fraction of its AI-driven capabilities.
Crest Data helps teams operationalize AI-driven observability by improving anomaly detection, event correlation, root-cause analysis, and operational workflows. This helps reduce manual investigation efforts, surface actionable insights faster, and improve operational efficiency across cloud and distributed systems.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other Dynatrace service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-2676)
sections.content:
Crest Data combines deep expertise in observability, cloud operations, SRE, automation, and enterprise platform engineering. Beyond implementation, we help organizations build mature observability practices, improve platform adoption, optimize operational workflows, and drive measurable reliability improvements across the business.
Our focus is not just on deploying Dynatrace, but on helping organizations get lasting operational value from it.

sections.heading: [ How long does a Dynatrace migration typically take? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/#collapse-2677)
sections.content: Migration timelines depend on environment complexity, monitored applications, integrations, dashboards, and business requirements. Crest Data's proprietary AI-driven migration engine helps automate key migration activities, reducing migration efforts from months or weeks to days in many scenarios while minimizing risk and operational disruption.

sections.heading: Unifying Data Intelligence with Elasticsearch, Observability, and Security to Drive Operational Resilience
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Elastic

sections.heading: With hyper-distributed digital ecosystems churning out exponential volumes of data,
sections.content:
Elastic offers a cutting-edge AI platform to search, observe, and secure this data landscape. By consolidating these domains into a scalable platform, our Elastic services empower enterprises to leverage the Elastic stack to derive actionable intelligence, gain deeper data visibility, and accelerate operational resilience.
​Our Elastic observability services provide holistic visibility across your IT infrastructure, applications, logs, metrics, and APM environments to ensure early threat detection and faster incident response. Our Elastic enterprise search services leverage AI-powered vector and keywords search to surface critical information from massive datasets. Our Security services help enterprises strengthen their SOC through SIEM, endpoint protection, threat intelligence, and more.
![](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Elastic-Solutions.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for Elastic Services?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Proven Open-Source Contribution and Standardization ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-5261)
sections.content: Having developed a deep partnership with Elastic, Crest Data has developed over **150 open-source Elastic** integrations across Security, Observability, and Enterprise Search to provide a unified view and boost team productivity.

sections.heading: [ Unified Observability ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-5262)
sections.content: Crest demonstrates strong capability to build custom, enriched dashboards to provide a unified view of an enterprise's entire infrastructure and identify issues by monitoring the key metrics and health of the system.

sections.heading: [ Expert Security Analytics & Detection ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-5263)
sections.content: Our security experts leverage their expertise to help bring security insights to Elastic by integrating some of the most widely used security products and capabilities.

sections.heading: [ Best Implementation Standards ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-5264)
sections.content: We adhere to stringent official standards and strategies established by Elastic to focus on future-proofing application performance. Our standards help enterprises improve company productivity and ensure seamless third-party data ingestion.

sections.heading: [ Accelerated AI-Driven Migration ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-5265)
sections.content: Our proprietary AI-driven migration engine accelerates the migration of **90%** of critical assets like dashboards and alerts from legacy platforms to Elastic.

sections.heading: Elastic Implementation Services
sections.content: Our proven Elastic implementation services ensure that enterprises receive maximum value through custom deployments that suit their unique needs and business challenges. With extensive expertise in end-to-end implementation lifecycle from initial environment setup, development of data ingestion pipeline, index design, and intuitive dashboard creation, our team ensures that they utilize the best industry standards and proven strategies to ensure that things are implemented “right-the-first-time.” Boost your company's overall productivity with our scalable, high-performance implementations.

sections.heading: Elastic Migration Services
sections.content: Our inclusive Elastic migration services help enterprises seamlessly transition from legacy platforms to the Elastic stack with minimal disruption. Our experts have extensive proficiency in Elastic Stack migration, including architecture design, data reindexing, pipeline transformation, dashboard creation, and integration updates. Our AI-driven migration engine expedites the automatic migration of dashboards and alerts from legacy platforms to Elastic. Leveraging structured planning and phased execution, we provide high-speed, seamless data ingestion with minimal downtime, empowering enterprises to achieve optimal performance with future-ready Elastic platform capabilities.

sections.heading: Elastic Integration Services
sections.content: Crest Data’s integration services efficiently leverage official company standards and best practices to develop custom Elastic integrations across Security, Observability, and Enterprise Search. Our robust integration services ensure seamless ingestion and transformation of data from diverse sources to build custom, enriched dashboards and reports. Having developed powerful open-source integrations, we leverage our integration expertise to provide enterprises with a holistic view of their infrastructure by correlating logs from multiple platforms.

sections.heading: Elastic Managed Services
sections.content: Our inclusive Elastic managed services empower enterprises to maintain a secure, reliable, and high-performing Elastic environment with continuous monitoring, efficient scaling, and robust maintenance. Our team has deep expertise in optimizing Elastic Stack through cluster monitoring, query optimization, performance tuning, index lifecycle management, capacity planning, and infrastructure optimization across cloud, on-premise, and hybrid deployments. With platform governance and operational support, we help enterprises to extract intelligent insights from their vast data, fostering quick decision-making aligned with evolving business needs.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations get more value from Elastic? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-2101)
sections.content:
Elastic can support observability, security analytics, and enterprise search on a single platform, but success depends on how well data is integrated and operationalized.
Crest Data helps organizations build unified Elastic environments that bring together logs, metrics, security telemetry, and enterprise data to improve visibility, accelerate investigations, and support faster decision-making across teams.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations migrate to Elastic from legacy observability and security platforms?  ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-2102)
sections.content:
Large-scale platform migrations can be time-consuming, resource-intensive, and disruptive to ongoing operations. Crest Data streamlines the migration process through a proprietary AI-driven migration engine that helps automate the conversion of dashboards, alerts, detection content, and other operational assets. By reducing manual effort and accelerating migration activities, organizations can modernize their observability and security operations faster while maintaining operational continuity and minimizing migration risk.
This allows teams to focus less on rebuilding existing capabilities and more on unlocking the value of Elastic.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data develop custom Elastic integrations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-2103)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data has developed more than 150 open-source Elastic integrations across Security, Observability, and Enterprise Search use cases.
Our team helps organizations integrate data from cloud platforms, security tools, infrastructure systems, and business applications to create a unified and actionable view of their environment.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations improve Elastic Security operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-2104)
sections.content:
Crest Data helps organizations onboard security telemetry, normalize data, build detection use cases, and create enriched security dashboards within Elastic.
By bringing together data from multiple security technologies, we help security teams improve visibility, accelerate investigations, and strengthen threat detection capabilities.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data support Elastic Enterprise Search initiatives? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-2105)
sections.content:
Elastic Enterprise Search is most effective when data from multiple systems can be easily discovered and accessed.
Crest Data helps organizations build enterprise search solutions that connect information across platforms, documents, collaboration tools, and business applications, making critical information easier to find and use across the organization.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other Elastic service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-2106)
sections.content: Crest Data combines deep Elastic expertise with proven integration, migration, observability, security, and enterprise search experience. Having developed 150+ open-source Elastic integrations and AI-driven migration capabilities, we help organizations accelerate adoption, simplify data onboarding, and unlock more value from their Elastic investment.

sections.heading: [ Can Elastic Security replace traditional SIEM platforms? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/elastic/#collapse-2107)
sections.content: Elastic Security can serve as a modern security analytics and SIEM platform for many organizations. Crest Data helps evaluate requirements, build migration strategies, and implement security operations workflows that align with business and compliance needs.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Turn enterprise data into intelligent actions with Generative AI built for real-world decision-making.
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. Generative AI

sections.heading: Generative AI is redefining how enterprises operate, enabling faster decision-making, intelligent automation, and entirely new ways to engage customers and employees.
sections.content:
At Crest Data, we help organizations move beyond experimentation to production-grade Generative AI solutions that are secure and business-aligned.
From rapid proofs of concept to enterprise-wide deployments, our Generative AI services are designed to integrate seamlessly into existing workflows while meeting stringent security, compliance, and performance requirements. Leveraging advanced AI agents, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), fine-tuned large language models, and robust guardrails, we deliver custom generative AI solutions that unlock actionable insights, reduce operational overhead, and accelerate innovation without compromising trust or control.
![Generative AI Solutions Crest Data](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Generative-AI-Solutions-Crest-Data.jpg)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for Generative AI?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Faster Time-to-Market ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/generative-ai/#collapse-1021)
sections.content: Delivered a revenue-generating Generative AI system in just**2 months** , accelerating enterprise adoption with minimal risk.

sections.heading: [ Proven Operational Gains ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/generative-ai/#collapse-1022)
sections.content: Achieve **40% reduction** in alert management**time** with significant improvements in MTTD and MTTR.

sections.heading: [ Enterprise-Ready Architecture ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/generative-ai/#collapse-1023)
sections.content: Build scalable enterprise AI solutions using AWS Bedrock, ChatGPT-5.2, and flexible multi-LLM architectures designed for production workloads.

sections.heading: [ AI Embedded in Workflows ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/generative-ai/#collapse-1024)
sections.content: Enable multi-source correlation and conversational AI solutions directly within existing enterprise tools for faster adoption and higher ROI.

sections.heading: AI Agents
sections.content: We design and deploy autonomous AI agents that execute complex workflows across enterprise systems. These agents can analyze data, trigger actions, and collaborate with humans to boost productivity and reduce manual effort. Built for reliability and governance, our AI agents operate within defined business rules, integrate with existing tools, and adapt to evolving requirements enabling intelligent automation at scale.

sections.heading: RAG Systems
sections.content: Our Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems combine the creativity of large language models with enterprise knowledge sources to deliver accurate, context-aware responses. By grounding AI outputs in trusted data across documents, databases, and tools, we enable reliable decision support, advanced investigation workflows, and insight-driven automation. RAG is a foundational capability in many enterprise Gen AI implementation examples we deliver.

sections.heading: Intelligent Chatbots
sections.content: We build advanced conversational AI systems that go beyond basic Q&A, our conversational AI solutions understand context, integrate with enterprise applications, and support multi-step workflows. Deployed within existing environments, they improve customer engagement, reduce response times, and empower internal teams with natural language access to critical systems and insights.

sections.heading: Fine-Tuning LLMs
sections.content: We fine-tune large language models to align with your industry, data, and business objectives. By customizing model behavior, tone, and domain understanding, we deliver higher accuracy, better relevance, and improved performance for enterprise use cases while ensuring data privacy and regulatory compliance.

sections.heading: Guardrails
sections.content: We implement robust guardrails to ensure safe, compliant, and trustworthy Generative AI deployments. Our frameworks include prompt controls, access governance, monitoring, auditability, and bias mitigation helping enterprises deploy AI confidently while meeting regulatory and ethical standards.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: AI-Driven Google SecOps Services for Scalable, Automated Security Operations
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Google Secops SIME

sections.heading: Google SecOps is a unified, cloud-native security operations platform
sections.content:
built to collect, normalize, detect, and respond to threats at scale. As part of comprehensive Google SecOps services, it combines advanced Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) capabilities with Security Orchestration, Automation, and Response (SOAR) for intelligent remediation.
At Crest Data, we deliver enterprise-grade Google SecOps consulting services, Google SecOps integration services, and Google SecOps implementation services that help organizations maximize platform value through scalable data ingestion, accurate UDM normalization, high-fidelity detections, and automated response workflows. Our structured Google SecOps deployment services empower enterprises looking to understand how to implement Google SecOps for enterprises securely and efficiently.
![Google+SecOps+for+Enhanced+Security+Operations](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/GoogleSecOpsforEnhancedSecurityOperations.png)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for Google SecOps?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ 5000+ Integrations Delivered ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-1011)
sections.content: Deep integration expertise across SIEM, SOAR, cloud, and security ecosystems, enabling seamless Google SecOps adoption.

sections.heading: [ 100+ Customers Rely on Our Gold Parsers ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-1012)
sections.content: Proven UDM normalization capabilities driving accurate detections and reduced data noise.

sections.heading: [ End-to-End Services ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-1013)
sections.content: From ingestion and parser development to playbooks, automation, migration, and optimization.

sections.heading: [ Agentic AI Leadership ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-1014)
sections.content: MCP and A2A implementations advancing autonomous security use case automation while ensuring backward compatibility.

sections.heading: [ Reduced Alert Fatigue ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-1015)
sections.content: * Actionable alert engineering and SOAR automation improving SOC efficiency and incident response times.

sections.heading: Our Google SecOps Offerings
sections.content:
Delivering end-to-end Google SecOps services from integration and deployment to automation and managed security operations designed to help enterprises implement, scale, and optimize modern security operations with confidence.
  * [Google SecOps SIEM](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#lqd-tab-9241)
  * [Google SecOps SOAR](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#lqd-tab-9242)
  * [Professional Services](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#lqd-tab-9243)

sections.heading: Gold Parsers
sections.content: We convert raw log data into structured Google SecOps UDM format, enabling accurate normalization and high-fidelity detections. Our Gold Parsers are production-proven and used by hundreds of customers to ensure data consistency, integrity, and scalable ingestion across diverse environments.

sections.heading: Content Packs
sections.content: Comprehensive bundles including ingestion mechanisms, parsers, product-specific detection rules, UDM searches, and native dashboards. Our content packs accelerate time-to-value by delivering ready-to-deploy detection and monitoring frameworks across the security ecosystem.

sections.heading: Back Office Portal Development
sections.content: We support Google SecOps CLI-driven operations, enabling efficient feed, parser, and forwarder management. Our back-office enhancements improve operational control, streamline administration, and simplify complex configuration tasks for large-scale environments.

sections.heading: User Interface (UI) Enhancement
sections.content: We enhance Google SecOps UI capabilities, including accessibility improvements (keyboard navigation, screen readers, color contrast), localization support, expanded automation testing coverage, and dashboard issue resolution to improve overall user experience.

sections.heading: Native Dashboard Migration & ML Parsing
sections.content: We support dashboard migration from Looker to YARA-L and contribute to ML-based parsing initiatives by training models to accurately map raw logs to UDM fields, improving detection accuracy and analytical precision.

sections.heading: Third-Party SIEM Integration
sections.content: We build custom applications covering ingestion, parsing, rule creation, and dashboards. Our scripts leverage Google Cloud Functions to ingest data from third-party sources seamlessly into Google SecOps environments.

sections.heading: API Migration
sections.content: We migrate legacy Google SecOps API endpoints to unified API surfaces, improving efficiency, maintainability, and integration reliability across connected systems and applications.

sections.heading: GCP Secret Migration
sections.content: We’ve developed specialized tools to migrate secrets from vault solutions such as HashiCorp Vault to GCP Secret Manager, ensuring secure transitions and alignment with cloud-native best practices.

sections.heading: Integration Development
sections.content: Our enterprise-grade Google SecOps SOAR implementation services include actions, connectors, and jobs that ingest threats and detections seamlessly across security platforms.

sections.heading: Playbook Creation & Delivery
sections.content: Embedded within our strategic Google SecOps managed services, we design automated playbooks supporting threat response, intelligence enrichment, and incident auto-resolution for scalable automation.

sections.heading: Implementation Services
sections.content: End-to-end setup and configuration from scratch, including custom integrations, dashboard design (Looker and native), detection rule development, and secure architecture deployment.

sections.heading: Integration Development Services
sections.content: We build custom connectors and convert raw logs into UDM-compliant structured formats using proven Gold Parsers, ensuring scalable ingestion, normalized telemetry, and reliable detection engineering.

sections.heading: Migration Services
sections.content: Seamless migration from legacy SecOps, SIEM, or SOAR platforms to Google SecOps with full data continuity, efficient onboarding, and minimal operational disruption.

sections.heading: Optimization Services
sections.content: Alert tuning to reduce noise, prioritize high-risk incidents, perform regular audits, and optimize dashboards for actionable insights and improved SOC productivity.

sections.heading: Custom Solutions
sections.content: Development of tailored dashboards, automation scripts integrated with Google Cloud Platform, and advanced reporting frameworks, along with training and enablement programs.

sections.heading: Security Expertise
sections.content: Tailored security configurations, proactive threat monitoring, and vulnerability oversight to strengthen defensive posture and ensure continuous protection.

sections.heading: Agentic AI Enablement
sections.content: Leveraging experience from 5,000+ integrations, we advance agentic automation through MCP and A2A implementations that evolve with emerging AI capabilities while protecting existing investments.

sections.heading: Ongoing Support & Maintenance
sections.content: Comprehensive Google SecOps managed services, including health checks, proactive monitoring, issue resolution, and expert technical support to ensure long-term operational reliability.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations get more value from Google SecOps? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2061)
sections.content: Crest Data helps organizations move beyond simply deploying Google SecOps to building a security operations platform that delivers measurable outcomes. Our team helps with onboarding data sources, developing detection content, optimizing investigations, automating workflows, and improving SOC efficiency so security teams can detect and respond to threats faster.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve threat detection within Google SecOps? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2062)
sections.content:
Technology alone does not improve security outcomes. Effective threat detection depends on the quality of detection logic, data visibility, and operational processes.
Crest Data helps organizations build and optimize detection use cases, reduce false positives, enrich security telemetry, and develop detection strategies aligned to their business risks and security objectives.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help reduce operational complexity in security operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2063)
sections.content:
Security teams often spend significant time investigating alerts, switching between multiple tools, and manually managing detection content and response workflows.
Crest Data helps organizations consolidate security visibility within Google SecOps, automate repetitive investigation and response tasks, and streamline security operations through integrations, detection engineering, and workflow automation. By reducing manual effort and improving analyst efficiency, organizations can significantly lower operational overhead, accelerate investigations, and reduce the time spent on routine security operations by up to 60%.
The result is a more efficient SOC that can focus on high-priority threats instead of repetitive operational tasks.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations maximize the value of Google SecOps across their security ecosystem? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2064)
sections.content:
Google SecOps is most effective when security data, tools, and workflows work together seamlessly.
Crest Data helps organizations integrate Google SecOps with cloud platforms, identity systems, endpoint security solutions, threat intelligence sources, and operational workflows. Combined with our expertise in detection engineering, security data management, and automation, this helps security teams improve visibility, accelerate investigations, and operate more efficiently.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other Google SecOps service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2065)
sections.content: Crest Data brings deep expertise in security operations, large-scale security data engineering, and platform integration. Our team has experience helping organizations ingest and operationalize high volumes of security telemetry, integrate complex security ecosystems, and improve threat detection and response processes. We focus on helping customers realize long-term operational value from Google SecOps- not just completing a platform implementation.

sections.heading: [ How can Crest Data help with Google SecOps implementation? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2066)
sections.content: Crest Data provides end-to-end Google SecOps services, including platform deployment, architecture design, data onboarding, detection engineering, use case development, content migration, threat hunting, workflow automation, and managed security operations.

sections.heading: [ Can Crest Data migrate from Splunk, QRadar, Sentinel, or other SIEM platforms to Google SecOps? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2067)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps organizations migrate from legacy and modern SIEM platforms, including Splunk, IBM QRadar, Microsoft Sentinel, LogRhythm, ArcSight, and other security analytics solutions to Google SecOps while minimizing operational disruption and preserving security visibility.

sections.heading: [ What should organizations consider before migrating to Google SecOps? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/google-secops/#collapse-2068)
sections.content: Organizations should evaluate their existing SIEM architecture, security data sources, detection content, compliance requirements, retention policies, SOC workflows, and integration landscape. Crest Data helps assess migration readiness and develop a structured transition plan.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:

He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.

sections.content:

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.

sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
