sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Real-Time Threat Detection and Deep Security Visibility with Expert IBM QRadar Services
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. IBM QRadar

sections.heading: Crest Data offers comprehensive IBM QRadar Services
sections.content:
helping enterprises strengthen their Security Operations Center (SOC) through efficient threat detection, deep real-time IT infrastructure visibility, and faster incident response.
With comprehensive IBM QRadar Consulting services, our team extends IBM QRadar capabilities to help enterprises develop scalable SIEM architecture through log management, network flow analysis, and security analytics across the IT infrastructure. Our continuous QRadar real-time security monitoring services and proactive QRadar threat detection services empower enterprises to identify and respond to potential threats quickly. Through our IBM QRadar managed services, our team holds extensive expertise in providing performance tuning, performance optimization, platform management, and migration assistance to help enterprises extract actionable insights, reducing alert fatigue and improving response times. 
![IBM Qradar](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/IBM-Qradar.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for IBM QRadar Services?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Advanced Automation and Reduced MTTD ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-4261)
sections.content: Proven expertise in custom integration development ensures advanced-level threat correlation, significantly reducing investigation time from**hours to seconds.**

sections.heading: [ Accelerated Time-to-Value & Deployment ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-4262)
sections.content: Leveraging an AI-driven migration engine helps reduce traditional deployment and migration timelines by up to **60%.**

sections.heading: [ Zero-Disruption Migration Framework ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-4263)
sections.content: With experience of successfully delivering over **5,000+** enterprise integrations to**150+** global customers, we ensure seamless transitions between security platforms with zero downtime.

sections.heading: [ Significant Operational Cost Savings ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-4264)
sections.content: Through our managed services and automation-first engineering practices, we help organizations achieve significant savings in operational and log management costs.

sections.heading: IBM QRadar Implementation Services
sections.content: We offer comprehensive IBM QRadar implementation services that enable enterprises to operationalize a robust and scalable SIEM environment. Our team of security experts manages everything from architecture planning to infrastructure setup, log source onboarding, network flow configuration, and correlation rule tuning. Through our tested deployment techniques, we assist enterprises in achieving a stable and resilient QRadar environment that makes optimal use of processing resources, improves correlation of events and alerts, and strengthens security posture.

sections.heading: IBM QRadar Migration
sections.content: Our IBM QRadar migration services help enterprises smoothly transition from their SIEM or SOAR platform to IBM QRadar with minimal disruption. Leveraging our proprietary AI-driven migration engine, enterprises can significantly reduce their routine migration and deployment timelines. With extensive experience in successfully migrating huge amounts of integrations, we ensure seamless, zero-downtime migrations and a smooth, operational QRadar environment from day one. We focus on maintaining data integrity, ensuring that all historical data, complex correlation rules, and custom log sources are accurately transferred to the new environment.

sections.heading: IBM QRadar Integration Services
sections.content: Our IBM QRadar Integration Services ensure the development of enterprise-grade, scalable security solutions that connect QRadar with external third-party platforms, including endpoint detection and response (EDR) tools, cloud native apps, identity management solutions, and network devices. Leveraging our expertise in custom integrations, we help enterprises receive insightful operational intelligence and rich context by allowing real-time correlation with high-volume security telemetry data to significantly reduce the Mean Time to Detect (MTTD).

sections.heading: IBM QRadar Managed Services
sections.content: Our IBM QRadar Managed Services empowers enterprises to maintain a robust security posture with continuous security intelligence monitoring, performance tuning, platform optimization, and proactive threat detection. Our team of expert security analysts has experience in managing the entire QRadar environment – from initial deployment and configuration to regular health checks, monitoring, and optimization. Through continuous fine-tuning of correlation rules and leveraging threat intelligence, our team helps reduce threat detection times and minimize alert noise.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations maximize the value of IBM QRadar? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-2081)
sections.content:
Many organizations deploy QRadar but struggle to keep pace with growing security data volumes, evolving threats, and operational complexity.
Crest Data helps organizations optimize QRadar environments through use case development, log source onboarding, rule tuning, dashboard customization, and workflow improvements that help security teams gain better visibility and improve operational efficiency.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve threat detection within QRadar? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-2082)
sections.content:
Effective threat detection depends on more than simply collecting logs.
Crest Data helps organizations develop and optimize detection use cases, tune correlation rules, enrich security data, and align monitoring strategies with business risks. This helps reduce false positives while improving the identification of meaningful security events.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide QRadar health checks and platform optimization services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-2083)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data helps organizations assess existing QRadar deployments to identify performance bottlenecks, detection gaps, inefficient workflows, content issues, and platform optimization opportunities.
The result is a more efficient and scalable SIEM environment that better supports security operations.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other IBM QRadar service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-2084)
sections.content:
Crest Data combines SIEM expertise with deep experience in security data engineering, platform integrations, detection engineering, and security operations. Our team has helped organizations onboard large-scale security telemetry, improve detection coverage, and optimize security operations across complex enterprise environments.
Rather than focusing solely on platform deployment, we help organizations build mature and scalable security operations programs around QRadar that deliver long-term value.

sections.heading: [ Can Crest Data integrate IBM QRadar with other security and IT platforms? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/ibm-qradar/#collapse-2085)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates IBM QRadar with EDR, XDR, SOAR, IAM, vulnerability management, cloud security, ticketing, observability, and ITSM platforms to create a more connected and automated security ecosystem.

sections.heading: Advisor

A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

sections.content:

sections.content:

He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.

sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Engage our experienced ITOps to automate routine tasks, proactively deliver high-quality IT support and increase productivity by leveraging best-practices and rapidly implementing or consolidating IT apps to the most innovative ITSM platforms.
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. ITSM

sections.heading: Our Managed ITSM Services
sections.content:
Engage Crest Data experienced ITOps having breadth of expertise managing IT operations with engineering, managed and professional services by leveraging the full potential of ITSM platform. 
![ITSM](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/ITSM.jpg)

sections.heading: Our qualified and experienced IT professionals provide the technical expertise and skills required to manage multi-vendor IT environments.
sections.content:
Crest Data works with you as a strategic partner, offering managed ITSM services for Day 2 operations for your ITSM solution.
We ensure the ITSM is stable by providing quick help on trouble tickets, implement support for minor refinements to cater to your actual usage patterns. These collectively speed ITSM platform adoption and enable rapid ROI for your enterprise.

sections.heading: ITSM Administration and Management
sections.content:
• Administers ITSM application completely in your production environment   
• Refine the ITSM software configuration based on your usage patterns   
• Ensures stability and availability of the software   
• Ensure best practices and standard operating procedures for ITSM   
• Remote and on-site Technical support   
• Change Management   
• Asset Management

sections.heading: IT Operations Monitoring
sections.content:
• Infrastructure Monitoring   
• Cloud Monitoring   
• Application Monitoring   
• Server Monitoring   
• Network Monitoring   
• DevOps – Upgrades, Migrations and Patch Management   
• Desktop Support and Maintenance

sections.heading: Benefits We Deliver
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ 360-degree IT Services Intelligence ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/itsm/#collapse-2161)
sections.content: We enable visibility of end-to-end IT operations helping enterprises to identify problems, execute intelligence-driven investigations, triage issues, and accelerate incident responses.

sections.heading: [ Improve the productivity of IT staff ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/itsm/#collapse-2162)
sections.content: With Crest’s managed ITSM services releases your internal IT staff from the daily operational challenges so they can focus on your core business activities and more strategic functions.

sections.heading: [ Automate incident management ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/itsm/#collapse-2163)
sections.content: Our ITSM experts can help integrate industry-standard metrics, logs and your monitoring toolset into a single source of truth that allows on-call teams to quickly fix problems.

sections.heading: [ Reduce cost of security operations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/itsm/#collapse-2164)
sections.content: With crest data managed SOC service, enterprises can reduce in-house security staff to maintain security operations center. We also help improve return on overall technology investment by reducing required disparate and expensive SIEM solutions that are difficult to manage.

sections.heading: [ Complete SLA-based services ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/itsm/#collapse-2165)
sections.content: We provide managed ITSM services as per Crest defined different SLAs models, which can also be customized as per business need.

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Secure, Scalable AI Agent Connectivity Across Enterprise Systems
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. MCP Solutions
Enterprise MCP Solution

sections.heading: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is emerging as a critical layer for enabling seamless interaction between AI systems and enterprise environments.
sections.content:
At Crest Data, we design and implement enterprise-grade MCP solutions that standardize how AI agents connect to tools, data sources, and business applications. By building MCP tools, we create a unified interface that allows large language models (LLMs) to securely access files, databases, and APIs without requiring custom integrations for each system. Our approach reduces integration complexity while ensuring governance, security, and scalability. With the right set of MCP tools, organizations can operationalize AI agents more effectively, enabling real-time tool access, structured execution, and consistent performance across evolving enterprise ecosystems while maintaining control over data access and compliance requirements.
![MCP Solution](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/MCP-Solution.webp)

sections.heading: Why Choose Crest Data?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Faster AI Integration ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mcp-solution/#collapse-1251)
sections.content: Reduce integration effort by up to **60%** with standardized MCP-based connectivity across tools and platforms

sections.heading: [ Enterprise-Grade Security ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mcp-solution/#collapse-1252)
sections.content: Ensure **100% governed access** with role-based controls and compliance-aligned architectures

sections.heading: [ Scalable Architecture ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mcp-solution/#collapse-1253)
sections.content: Built to support **multi-agent, multi-system environments** across enterprise-scale operations

sections.heading: [ Operational Efficiency ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mcp-solution/#collapse-1254)
sections.content: Enable real-time tool access and automation, improving workflow efficiency by **40%+**

sections.heading: [ Future-Ready Design ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mcp-solution/#collapse-1255)
sections.content: Adapt to evolving AI models and platforms without re-engineering core integrations

sections.heading: MCP Strategy & Architecture
sections.content: We assess your enterprise ecosystem, including tools, systems, and integrations, to define a robust MCP strategy. Our team designs secure, scalable architectures aligned with governance, compliance, and operational goals. This ensures AI agents operate reliably across systems with structured access and control, enabling confident and scalable AI adoption.

sections.heading: Secure Tool & Data Access Enablement
sections.content: Our MCP implementations enable secure access to enterprise tools, data, and systems while preserving permissions and governance frameworks. We enforce strict security controls and role-based access policies, allowing AI adoption across sensitive environments without compromising data integrity, compliance, or operational control.

sections.heading: Testing, Deployment & Validation
sections.content: We conduct rigorous testing and validation to ensure MCP implementations are secure, reliable, and production-ready. Our approach includes performance, functional, and security checks, followed by seamless deployment with minimal disruption. This ensures stable operations and reduces risks during production rollouts.

sections.heading: Custom MCP Tools Development
sections.content: We build customized MCP tools that connect AI agents to enterprise tools, data sources, and systems through standardized interfaces. These servers ensure secure, reliable interactions while supporting multiple AI models and platforms, eliminating repeated integrations and enabling scalable AI ecosystem growth.

sections.heading: Documentation, Training & Enablement
sections.content: We provide comprehensive documentation, training, and knowledge transfer to help teams manage and scale MCP implementations effectively. This ensures long-term sustainability, reduces dependency on external teams, and empowers organizations to maximize the value of their AI investments.

sections.content:
Please leave this field empty.I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

sections.heading: Your Trusted MLOps Services Provider for Enterprise-Scale AI
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. MLOps

sections.heading: Modern enterprises struggle to move machine learning models from experimentation to production while maintaining high standards of performance, governance, and scalability.
sections.content:
As an experienced MLOps services provider, we deliver enterprise MLOps solutions that bridge this gap by building robust, end-to-end frameworks across the ML lifecycle. From data ingestion and model development to CI/CD in machine learning, automated deployment, and model monitoring and observability, we ensure your AI systems are reliable and secure. Our approach combines strong data engineering, cloud-native infrastructure, and advanced ML observability to reduce time-to-production and operational risk. By applying best practices for MLOps, including versioning, governance, and machine learning automation tools, we help enterprises improve model performance, control costs, and realize the long-term benefits of MLOps for business.
![MLOPs Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/MLOPs-Solutions.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for MLOps?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Proven Production Scale ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1551)
sections.content: Delivered end-to-end ML and MLOps solutions supporting enterprise-grade workloads and global users.

sections.heading: [ Faster Time-to-Value ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1552)
sections.content: Accelerate model training cycles by up to **42%** through optimized pipelines and distributed training.

sections.heading: [ High-Quality Data Foundations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1553)
sections.content: Reduce data labeling effort by **60%** using custom annotation pipelines and QA processes.

sections.heading: [ CI/CD for ML ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1554)
sections.content: We can help you implement continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines for your ML models. This can help you speed up the development and deployment process and ensure that your models are always up-to-date.

sections.heading: [ Cloud-Native & Flexible ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1555)
sections.content: Expertise across AWS, hybrid, and on-prem environments with tools like MLflow, SageMaker, and PyTorch.

sections.heading: Data Pipeline Development
sections.content: We design and implement scalable data pipelines that power reliable machine learning systems. Our services cover data ingestion, preprocessing, validation, and feature engineering across batch and real-time workflows. With industry-specific preprocessing, custom annotation pipelines, and rigorous quality assurance, we ensure high-quality, model-ready data. These pipelines are built to scale with your business, integrate seamlessly with existing systems, and support continuous retraining for evolving data and use cases.

sections.heading: Model Development
sections.content: We build custom AI models aligned to your business objectives, from classical ML to deep learning and LLM-powered systems, we focus on performance, explainability, and scalability. Our teams manage experiment tracking, model versioning, and reproducibility using modern frameworks and tooling. The result is robust, production-ready models that deliver consistent accuracy and measurable ROI in real-world environments.

sections.heading: CI/CD for ML
sections.content: We implement automated CI/CD pipelines purpose-built for machine learning. These pipelines enable continuous integration, testing, validation, and deployment of models and data workflows. By automating retraining, validation, and release processes, we reduce manual effort, minimize errors, and ensure models remain up to date as data and requirements evolve. This structured approach highlights the practical MLOps vs DevOps differences, enabling faster releases while maintaining governance and compliance.

sections.heading: Deployment and Monitoring
sections.content: Our deployment and monitoring services ensure your models perform reliably in production. We support cloud, on-prem, and hybrid deployments with scalable infrastructure. Advanced ML observability tracks model accuracy, drift, latency, and resource usage in real time. Continuous monitoring and feedback loops enable proactive optimization, rapid issue detection, and sustained model performance aligned with business goals.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises operationalize and scale AI initiatives? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1371)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises move AI and machine learning initiatives from experimentation to production through scalable MLOps practices, automation, cloud-native infrastructure, and operational monitoring. The focus is on building AI environments that are reliable, scalable, and easier to manage long term.

sections.heading: [ What MLOps services does Crest Data provide? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1372)
sections.content: Crest Data provides services across ML pipeline automation, model deployment, model monitoring, MLOps platform implementation, AI infrastructure management, model governance, retraining workflows, operational analytics, and cloud-native ML environments.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support cloud-native MLOps environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1373)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises build cloud-native MLOps ecosystems across Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud to support scalable AI operations, automation, and distributed machine learning workloads.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve machine learning reliability and operational visibility? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1374)
sections.content: Crest Data combines observability, monitoring, automation, and operational intelligence to help enterprises monitor model performance, detect drift, improve reliability, and maintain visibility across machine learning environments and AI operations.

sections.heading: [ What is the difference between AIOps and MLOps? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1375)
sections.content:
AIOps focuses on using AI and machine learning to improve IT and infrastructure operations through anomaly detection, alert correlation, operational analytics, and automation.
MLOps focuses on operationalizing machine learning itself — including model deployment, monitoring, governance, retraining, and lifecycle management across production environments.
At Crest Data, we help enterprises implement both AIOps and MLOps practices to support scalable AI-native enterprise operations.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI-led automation for MLOps operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1376)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI-led automation into MLOps workflows to improve model monitoring, retraining orchestration, operational visibility, anomaly detection, and ML pipeline management across enterprise AI ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide ongoing MLOps support and managed AI operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1377)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data provides ongoing MLOps support including monitoring, operational optimization, model lifecycle management, infrastructure support, automation, and managed AI operations for enterprise-scale machine learning environments.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other enterprise MLOps service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/mlops/#collapse-1378)
sections.content: Crest Data combines expertise across AI engineering, observability, automation, cloud-native infrastructure, AIOps, and enterprise operations to help organizations build scalable MLOps environments that perform reliably in real production ecosystems.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Crest Data develops comprehensive observability integrations for enterprise applications

to capture crucial metrics and logs across your entire infrastructure. By unifying enterprise data within an AI-enabled observability platform, we provide actionable insights that help organizations identify and resolve issues rapidly while deriving the maximum value from their investments. Our deep technical expertise includes building over 5,000 integrations across a wide range of technologies and platforms. We specialize in transforming complex, distributed systems into cohesive views, empowering IT teams with real-time health monitoring and performance diagnostics that drive more informed business decisions and ensure long-term system reliability.
