sections.heading: Implementations
sections.content: We deploy and optimize tailored Infrastructure, Application, and AI Observability solutions to drive unified visibility. Our strategic pillars include Service Level Governance, where we implement the right SLIs to meet critical SLOs, and establishing data-driven observability maturity. By aligning frameworks with DevOps best practices, we ensure business-level integration, transforming complex environments into a cohesive view for proactive operations and long-term reliability.

sections.heading: Migrations
sections.content: Transition from legacy platforms with 60% lower costs and timelines using our Automated Migration Engine. We automate up to 90% of dashboard and alert conversions, significantly minimizing risk and technical complexity. Our dual-ingestion approach ensures operational continuity through a 60-90 day window, allowing you to build historical context in parallel. This ensures a seamless, risk-free cutover for your mission-critical data and security workflows.

sections.heading: Integrations
sections.content: Collect and analyze data from custom sources into leading platforms with our AI-driven integration services. Having built 5,000+ integrations across a wide range of technologies and platforms, we utilize autonomous AI agents to rapidly develop custom connectors (OTel/CNCF) and analytics. This reduces manual effort while ensuring high-quality, real-time data transformation. Our automated QA frameworks guarantee reliable, performant connectors for even the most complex enterprise APIs.

sections.heading: Managed Services
sections.content: Delegate full operational ownership of your observability environment to Crest Data to maximize uptime and ROI. We provide enterprise-class managed services built for zero-downtime operations, including L1/L2 support, access control, and data onboarding. Our team drives internal adoption and implements financial governance through monitoring and chargeback models. We ensure your platforms remain optimized, secure, and fully aligned with your evolving business objectives.

sections.heading: Amazon CloudWatch
sections.content:
As an AWS Cloud Operations Competency partner, Crest Data delivers 60% faster migrations to CloudWatch using AI-led automation. We unify operational, security, & compliance data into a single plane, reducing complexity while ensuring superior reliability & cost-effective threat detection.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/amazon-cloudwatch)

sections.heading: Dynatrace
sections.content:
Our strategic partnership with Dynatrace accelerates modernization through Crest Data’s proprietary AI-driven migration engine, integrations and managed services. We help enterprises migrate to Dynatrace with 60% lower timelines, focusing on aligning frameworks with DevOps best practices.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/dynatrace/)

sections.heading: Datadog
sections.content:
Crest Data is a featured Datadog Marketplace partner, specializing in complex integrations like NetApp ONTAP, Fortinet, and Netskope. We help customers achieve a 90% reduction in deployment time, migrating massive datasets and thousands of dashboards within weeks not months.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/datadog/)

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises improve operational visibility across modern environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1741)
sections.content:
Crest Data helps enterprises build observability ecosystems that provide real-time visibility across applications, infrastructure, cloud platforms, Kubernetes environments, APIs, and distributed systems.
By combining monitoring, logging, tracing, operational analytics, and AI-led intelligence, we help organizations improve reliability, reduce downtime, and troubleshoot issues faster across complex enterprise environments.

sections.heading: [ What enterprise observability services does Crest Data provide? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1742)
sections.content: Crest Data provides services across observability platform implementation, cloud monitoring, distributed tracing, log management, telemetry pipeline optimization, operational analytics, AIOps, observability automation, SRE enablement, and enterprise monitoring modernization.

sections.heading: [ Which observability and monitoring platforms does Crest Data support? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1743)
sections.content:
Crest Data works across leading enterprise observability and cloud monitoring platforms including Datadog, Dynatrace, Amazon CloudWatch, New Relic, Elastic, and more.
We help enterprises optimize, modernize, and scale observability operations across cloud environments.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve enterprise incident detection and operational response? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1744)
sections.content: Crest Data combines observability, operational analytics, intelligent alerting, and automation to help enterprises identify anomalies earlier, reduce operational blind spots, accelerate root-cause analysis, and improve incident response workflows across distributed systems.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI-led observability and AIOps services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1745)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI-driven operational intelligence into observability environments to help enterprises improve anomaly detection, alert correlation, operational forecasting, incident analysis, and automation across modern cloud and infrastructure ecosystems. Crest Data's AI-driven Migration Engine automates up to 90% of dashboard and alert conversions, reducing migration costs, timelines, and business disruption while ensuring continuity throughout the transition.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data support cloud-native and Kubernetes observability? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1746)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises implement observability practices across Kubernetes, containers, microservices, APIs, and distributed cloud-native environments to improve scalability, reliability, and operational visibility across modern application ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide observability automation and managed monitoring services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1747)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data provides observability automation, telemetry optimization, operational monitoring, alert management, reliability engineering, and managed observability services to help enterprises maintain scalable and operationally efficient environments. Crest Data provides end-to-end observability services, including implementations, migrations, integrations, platform optimization, and ongoing managed operations, helping organizations maximize ROI from their observability investments.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other enterprise observability service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/observability/#collapse-1748)
sections.content: Crest Data combines observability expertise with AI-led operations, SRE, automation, cloud-native engineering, and enterprise-scale operational experience to help organizations build proactive, scalable, and reliability-focused observability ecosystems.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.

![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Strengthening Modern Enterprises with Intelligent Enterprise Security Services
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Security

sections.heading: Crest Data is a leading security solutions provider
sections.content:
that helps enterprises design, build, and operate modern security platforms capable of scaling with today’s evolving threat landscape. We combine deep expertise across SIEM, SOAR, XDR, IAM, and endpoint security with strong capabilities in data engineering and automation to deliver faster detection, improved visibility, and resilient security operations.
​​Our enterprise security solutions are built for real-world scale and complexity; from onboarding hundreds of tenants to processing tens of terabytes of data daily. We enable real-time threat detection, efficient log and telemetry management, and seamless integration across on-premises, cloud, and hybrid environments.
With a strong focus on performance, availability, and user experience, Crest Data helps security teams reduce alert noise, accelerate response times, and strengthen their overall security posture, all without disrupting business operations.
[ Explore now  ](https://www.crestdata.ai/blogs/ai-vulnerability-storm-is-here-is-your-security-operations-mythos-ready/)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for Security Services?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Proven at Enterprise Scale ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-1661)
sections.content: Designed, built, and operationalized Enterprise Security platforms processing **10+ TB/day** , with high-performance ingestion across **150+** security data sources.

sections.heading: [ Faster Time to Value ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-1662)
sections.content: Delivered GA-ready Enterprise Security Solutions within 12 months and accelerated GTM by engineering complete solutions in as little as 3 months.

sections.heading: [ Advanced Threat Detection ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-1663)
sections.content: Enabled real-time threat detection with AI-driven, rule-based engines, and threat intelligence integration**,** reducing detection delays by **90%** and incident resolution time significantly.

sections.heading: [ Operational Excellence ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-1664)
sections.content:
Improved platform and agent performance by **60%** , database IO operations by **80%** , and achieved high availability aligned with modern Cybersecurity best practices.
Download brochure

sections.heading: Implementations
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises implement modern Enterprise Security Solutions that are scalable, resilient, and aligned to business outcomes. We design and deploy SIEM, SOAR, IAM, XDR, cloud, network, and Enterprise Data Security Solutions with best-practice architectures, optimized detection logic, and automation-first workflows. Our implementation approach ensures faster go-live, strong governance, and platforms that are ready to scale from day one.

sections.heading: Integrations
sections.content: We specialize in integrating complex security ecosystems by connecting tools, data sources, and workflows into a unified security architecture. Crest Data delivers high-performance security platform integration, normalizes security data at scale, and engineers multi-tenant, highly available platforms. Our deep engineering expertise enables seamless interoperability across SIEM, SOAR, EDR, IAM, and third-party security tools, delivering faster security insights.

sections.heading: Migrations
sections.content:
Crest Data enables seamless security platform migrations with zero downtime and no business disruption. From SIEM and log management migrations to data store and architecture modernization, we help organizations move from legacy platforms to modern, high-performance environments. Our migration frameworks ensure data integrity, performance gains, and improved user experience while accelerating time to value.
[](https://www.crestdata.ai/migrations/)

sections.heading: Managed Security
sections.content: Our Managed Security Services provide continuous protection through 24×7 SOC operations and Threat Detection & Response. As a trusted SOC services provider Crest Data delivers Tier 1 through Tier 3 SOC services, combining real-time monitoring, advanced investigations, containment, and response with strong service governance. By augmenting or fully managing security operations, we help enterprises reduce operational burden, improve security maturity, and respond to threats with speed.

sections.heading: SIEM & SOAR
sections.content: We help organizations design, build, and continuously optimize SIEM and SOAR platforms to maximize visibility, accelerate response, and extract real value from security investments. Our expertise spans detection engineering, automation, integrations, and performance tuning helping teams understand SIEM vs SOAR comparison and extract real business value.

sections.heading: Data Security (DLP, CASB & DSPM)
sections.content: We deliver Enterprise Data Security Solutions using industry-leading DLP, CASB, and DSPM solutions. Fine-tuned by our Data Security SMEs, our approach ensures sensitive data is continuously discovered, classified, monitored, and protected against unauthorized access and misuse.

sections.heading: Cloud Security
sections.content: Crest Data helps secure cloud environments by implementing and optimizing top-tier cloud security solutions. Our Cloud Security SMEs focus on posture management, threat detection, and workload protection to reduce risk while maintaining agility across multi-cloud and hybrid deployments.

sections.heading: Network Security
sections.content: We strengthen network defenses through advanced network security integration, designing, deploying, and fine-tuning firewalls, IDS/IPS, network sensors, NDRs, and related controls. Our network security services improve visibility, reduce attack surface, and enable faster detection of anomalous and malicious activity.

sections.heading: Endpoint Management
sections.content: We deliver robust endpoint security solutions using leading EDR platforms, optimized by our Endpoint Security SMEs. Our services enhance threat detection, response, and endpoint performance while ensuring consistent protection across distributed workforces.

sections.heading: Vulnerability Management
sections.content: Crest Data enables proactive vulnerability management by implementing and fine-tuning IT and OT vulnerability remediation solutions. We help organizations identify, prioritize, and remediate risks efficiently to reduce exposure and strengthen security posture.

sections.heading: Identity & Access Management
sections.content: Our identity and access management services protect user identities by assessing IAM posture, securing Active Directory environments, and leveraging attack surface management tools. Our IAM services simplify access control, reduce identity-based risks, and improve compatibility with diverse identity providers.

sections.heading: Threat Detection & Response
sections.content: We deliver comprehensive Threat Detection & Response services through SOC Tier 1 monitoring and advanced Tier 2 & 3 investigations. Our services cover continuous threat monitoring, triage, containment, and response helping organizations reduce time and respond to incidents.

sections.heading: Testimonials
sections.content:
Market leader in building integrations for Security Analytics  
Crest Data successfully developed a robust ecosystem of third party integrations that has helped us to deliver increased value to our customers through our technology platform

sections.heading: Security Startup
sections.content:
We’re excited to welcome Crest Data to the Datadog Marketplace!  
Monitoring Dell EMC Isilon storage with new metrics and dashboards will help network engineers alert on and troubleshoot issues with data storage and access. By providing new integrations for Datadog customers, Crest Data will be a valuable addition to our partner ecosystem.

sections.heading: Sr. Director of Product Management, Datadog
sections.content:
90% reduction in deployment time!  
Migrating 2TB/day ElasticSearch environment to Splunk was a 6 month effort. Crest’s Professional Services team using their Migration tool finished the project to migrate 1500+ dashboards and over 100TB of indexed data from 80+ data sources in two weeks!

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises modernize security operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4111)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises strengthen security operations through cloud-native security practices, observability, automation, DevSecOps, and AI-led operational intelligence. The focus is on improving visibility, accelerating threat detection, and helping organizations respond faster across modern cloud and hybrid environments.

sections.heading: [ What enterprise security services does Crest Data provide? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4112)
sections.content: Crest Data provides services across cloud security, DevSecOps, security observability, security automation, threat detection, SIEM optimization, infrastructure security, compliance-focused engineering, vulnerability management, and AI-led security operations.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support cloud-native and hybrid security environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4113)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises secure cloud-native, hybrid, and distributed environments across Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, Kubernetes, containers, APIs, and modern enterprise infrastructure ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve threat detection and security visibility? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4114)
sections.content: Crest Data combines observability, operational analytics, intelligent alerting, and automation to help enterprises improve security visibility, reduce operational blind spots, strengthen threat detection, and accelerate incident response workflows.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI-led security operations and automation services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4115)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI-led operational intelligence into security environments to help enterprises improve anomaly detection, alert correlation, incident analysis, operational automation, and overall cyber resilience across distributed enterprise systems.

sections.heading: [ Which enterprise security and observability platforms does Crest Data support? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4116)
sections.content: Crest Data works across enterprise security, cloud, and observability ecosystems including Datadog, Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, Kubernetes environments, and enterprise cloud security operations platforms.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data integrate security into DevOps and cloud operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4117)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises implement DevSecOps practices that integrate security directly into CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, observability workflows, and software delivery processes. This helps organizations improve security posture without slowing down engineering velocity.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other enterprise security service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4118)
sections.content: Crest Data combines deep expertise in security, observability, automation, and data engineering to help enterprises build security operations that scale. With experience processing billions of security events and integrating hundreds of security data sources, we help organizations improve threat visibility, reduce operational complexity, and accelerate response across modern enterprise environments.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data compare to cybersecurity consulting companies that specialize only in SIEM deployments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/security/#collapse-4119)
sections.content: Crest Data goes beyond SIEM implementation by supporting SIEM, SOAR, XDR, IAM, cloud security, endpoint security, vulnerability management, and data security initiatives. We also provide engineering expertise to build integrations, automate workflows, and optimize security operations at scale.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:

Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.

sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.

sections.content:

An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Accelerating Enterprise Operations with ServiceNow Workflow Automation
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. ServiceNow

sections.heading: Crest Data enables organizations to run business-critical workflows through ServiceNow with speed and precision.
sections.content:
Our solutions replace fragmented, manual processes with automated, AI-driven workflows across teams and systems. As a trusted ServiceNow solutions provider, we help organizations automate how work flows across IT, security, HR, finance, legal, and employee services, reducing manual effort, delays, and dependency on human coordination.
Our focus is on designing end-to-end, AI-enabled workflows that connect requests, approvals, decisions, and actions across systems and teams through ServiceNow workflow automation services. By combining ServiceNow capabilities with deep integration expertise, intelligent routing, and real-time orchestration, we help departments to operate faster, with greater consistency and visibility across the ServiceNow cloud platform services.
![ServiceNow](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/ServiceNow-img-1-1024x631.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for ServiceNow Solutions?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ ServiceNow-Focused Delivery ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-1001)
sections.content: **250+ Platform Experts** dedicated to designing, building, and operating enterprise workflow automation solutions at scale.

sections.heading: [ Deep Integration Engineering ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-1002)
sections.content: Rebuilt and optimized multiple high-impact ServiceNow integration services (cloud security, email systems, virtualization platforms), handling large data volumes, multi-cloud complexity, and near-real-time workflows.

sections.heading: [ Performance-First Solutions ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-1003)
sections.content: Delivered solutions where catalog load times dropped from **3-5 minutes to seconds,** and large-scale searches **(10K+ accounts)** were reduced from days to minutes.

sections.heading: [ CMDB & Service Graph Expertise ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-1004)
sections.content:
Built and deployed various custom Service Graph Connectors and CMDB integrations supporting full and delta data ingestion, relationship visualization, and audit-ready reporting across multi-cloud environments.
Download brochure

sections.heading: Custom Workflow Development
sections.content: We design and build custom workflows on the ServiceNow platform to support unique business processes. Through custom workflow automation in ServiceNow, low-code configuration and full-stack development, we create structured workflows for requests, approvals, escalations, and orchestration. We focus on usability, maintainability, and extensibility, ensuring workflows adapt easily as organizational needs change.

sections.heading: IT Service Management
sections.content: We implement and optimize ITSM processes through ServiceNow ITSM implementation services to improve service reliability and operational efficiency. This includes incident, problem, change, request, and asset workflows designed around ITIL-aligned best practices. These implementations support enterprises evaluating how to implement ServiceNow for enterprise IT while reducing resolution times and standardizing service delivery.

sections.heading: Finance Workflows
sections.content: We enable ServiceNow-based workflows for finance operations covering policy-driven approvals, financial controls, task orchestration, and cross-system handoffs. By digitizing and standardizing finance-related processes, organizations gain better traceability, faster turnaround times, and improved governance. These workflows integrate seamlessly with upstream and downstream systems while maintaining auditability and control.

sections.heading: Legal Workflows
sections.content: We streamline legal operations by automating request intake, review cycles, approvals, and status tracking within ServiceNow. Our solutions help legal teams manage workloads efficiently, reduce manual coordination, and improve transparency for business stakeholders. Structured workflows ensure consistency while allowing flexibility for complex legal processes and compliance requirements.

sections.heading: HR Workflows
sections.content: We design employee-centric HR workflows that support onboarding, lifecycle changes, inquiries, and case management. ServiceNow HR workflows help centralize employee requests, standardize responses, and improve experience across the organization. Our implementations focus on ease of use, role-based access, and seamless handoffs between HR teams and supporting functions.

sections.heading: Security Incident & Threat Intel Workflows
sections.content: We design and implement ServiceNow SecOps workflows to automate security incident intake, investigation, prioritization, and response. By integrating security tools, threat intelligence, and CMDB context, we enable faster triage and coordinated actions across security and IT teams. Automated playbooks, conditional approvals, and intelligent routing reduce manual effort, improve response times, and ensure consistent handling of security events at enterprise scale.

sections.heading: Vulnerability Response Workflows
sections.content: We design and implement ServiceNow Vulnerability Response workflows to orchestrate end-to-end remediation across VR, Application Vulnerability Response, Container Vulnerability Response, Configuration Compliance, and Patch Management. These workflows identify and prioritize vulnerabilities using asset context and business impact, while continuously monitoring configurations against defined security baselines. Automated remediation, compliance enforcement, and drift tracking reduce exposure time, strengthen security posture, and minimize configuration-driven risk across the environment.

sections.heading: Governance, Risk & ComplianceWorkflows
sections.content: We automate ServiceNow GRC workflows to streamline risk assessments, policy management, control testing, and compliance tracking. Our solutions replace manual, spreadsheet-driven processes with structured workflows, approvals, and evidence collection. By aligning GRC workflows with business processes and IT operations, organizations gain real-time visibility into risk posture, improve audit readiness, and maintain continuous compliance with reduced operational overhead.

sections.heading: Operational Technology (OT) Workflows
sections.content: We design and implement ServiceNow workflows to support operational technology and plant environments by bringing OT assets such as PLCs, SCADA systems, and IoT devices into a structured, governed workflow model. Using CMDB and CSDM-aligned processes, we connect OT operations with incident, and change management to enable better coordination between IT, OT, and field teams. These workflows help reduce operational disruptions, improve traceability, and provide clear visibility across OT environments.

sections.heading: [ Why choose Crest Data as your ServiceNow implementation partner? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-2081)
sections.content: Crest Data combines ServiceNow expertise with deep experience in workflow automation, AI, cloud operations, observability, cybersecurity, and enterprise integrations. Our team helps organizations implement, customize, and optimize ServiceNow solutions that improve operational efficiency and accelerate digital transformation.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations automate workflows with ServiceNow? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-2082)
sections.content:
Workflow automation is one of the biggest reasons organizations invest in ServiceNow.
Crest Data helps automate service requests, approvals, incident management, change processes, operational workflows, and cross-functional business processes. This reduces manual effort, improves process consistency, and helps teams operate more efficiently.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide ServiceNow integration services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-2083)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data has extensive experience integrating ServiceNow with cloud platforms, observability tools, security solutions, DevOps environments, enterprise applications, and third-party systems.
These integrations help create connected workflows, eliminate operational silos, and improve visibility across the enterprise.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations leverage AI and automation within ServiceNow? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-2084)
sections.content:
As organizations adopt AI-driven operations, ServiceNow is increasingly becoming a platform for intelligent workflow automation.
Crest Data helps organizations integrate AI-led capabilities into ServiceNow workflows to improve service operations, automate repetitive tasks, accelerate issue resolution, and enhance employee and customer experiences.

sections.heading: [ What is Crest Data's expertise in improving ITSM and service operations with ServiceNow? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-2085)
sections.content:
Crest Data has extensive experience helping organizations modernize IT service management using ServiceNow. Our expertise spans incident management, change management, service request fulfillment, asset management, workflow automation, and enterprise service delivery.
We help organizations streamline operations, improve service quality, and create scalable service management processes that support long-term business growth.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other ServiceNow service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-2086)
sections.content:
Crest Data brings 250+ ServiceNow-focused experts with deep experience in enterprise workflow automation, integration engineering, and CMDB modernization. We have helped organizations optimize high-scale ServiceNow environments, reducing catalog load times from minutes to seconds and large-scale searches from days to minutes.
Our expertise in Service Graph Connectors, CMDB integrations, and multi-cloud data management enables organizations to build scalable, real-time workflows that extend the value of ServiceNow across the enterprise.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations integrate ServiceNow with their enterprise technology ecosystem? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/#collapse-2087)
sections.content:
ServiceNow delivers the most value when it is connected to the systems employees and operations teams use every day.
Crest Data has extensive experience integrating ServiceNow with cloud platforms, observability tools, security solutions, DevOps pipelines, identity platforms, and business applications. These integrations help eliminate manual handoffs, improve data consistency, and create seamless workflows across the enterprise.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.

![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.

![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.

![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.

![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: AI-led SRE to help enterprises run secure and always-available cloud platforms.
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)

sections.heading: Enterprise SRE Services at Crest Data
sections.content:
focuses on building and operating reliable, scalable systems across on-prem and hybrid multi-cloud environments. Our site reliability engineering services help businesses embed reliability into platform design, ongoing operations, and system management, while leveraging AI-led agents to strengthen observability and automation.
Our approach answers what is site reliability engineering in a practical, enterprise context by applying proven SRE principles to real-world business challenges. Our SRE engineers work closely with engineering and operations teams to assess platforms, standardize reliability practices, and reduce operational overhead through AI-driven monitoring, intelligent alert notifications, security risk detection and response, and automated remediation. This approach enables agile and efficient delivery of cloud solutions, ensuring applications remain highly available and aligned with user expectations as business needs evolve.
![](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Site-Reliability-Assessment-1024x853-1.png)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for SRE Services?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Measurable Reliability Gains ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1831)
sections.content: Enterprises typically see up to **60%** reduction in incidents, minimal to **zero downtime** , and consistent adherence to SLA and SLO targets.

sections.heading: [ AI-Led Toil Reduction ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1832)
sections.content: Our SRE operations services deliver a **70-85%** reduction in manual effort, shortens stack delivery timelines by **~70%** , and reduces turnaround times by up to **80%.**

sections.heading: [ Cloud & SRE Expertise at Scale ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1833)
sections.content: Crest Data provides SRE consulting services backed by Certified SRE engineers with hands-on experience across AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI, and on-prem environments, aligned with cloud-native and DevOps best practices.

sections.heading: [ Global Reliability Operations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1834)
sections.content: Our 24x7 SRE support services offer round-the-clock coverage through ITIL-based incident management , proactive RCA, and faster resolution across geographies.

sections.heading: [ Scalable & Cost-Efficient Operations ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1835)
sections.content: Businesses commonly achieve significant cost savings, reduce alert noise by **~70%,** and scale SRE teams efficiently from small teams to large enterprise operations while improving SLI/SLO visibility through structured governance.

sections.heading: Reliability Assessment & Optimization
sections.content: Crest Data’s SRE engineers assess your infrastructure, platforms, and applications against SRE best practices to identify reliability gaps and operational inefficiencies. We then work closely with cross-functional teams to optimize ongoing operations, streamlining incident management, access controls, server operations, and task standardization. Through automation, standardized runbooks, and cloud migrations, we reduce operational toil, fix architectural issues, and improve system resilience at scale.

sections.heading: Reliable System Architecture Design
sections.content: We design and validate resilient system architectures built for scalability, availability, and fault tolerance. Our SRE teams ensure platforms are implemented with a continuous integration mindset and capable of autonomous scaling. We also define upgrade and maintenance strategies that minimize risk, recommending fault-tolerant approaches and maintenance windows that help ensure minimal to zero downtime during system changes.

sections.heading: Monitoring, Incident & SLA Management
sections.content: Crest Data implements end-to-end monitoring across infrastructure, servers, and applications to maintain real-time visibility into system health. We proactively detect anomalies, manage incidents through disciplined ticket lifecycles, and address SLA risks before they impact users. With structured incident management and root cause analysis, we help teams maintain predictable performance and improve service reliability over time.

sections.heading: SRE as a Service
sections.content: Through SRE as a Service, Crest Data takes responsibility for implementing and operating SRE practices on your behalf. Our experienced SRE professionals provide 24×7 support, AI-led operations, and continuous improvement, while promoting strong collaboration between development and operations teams. This approach reduces operational overhead, enables faster scaling, and allows businesses to focus on their core business objectives.
