sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises improve system reliability and operational resilience? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1691)
sections.content: Crest Data helps enterprises improve reliability through observability, automation, SRE practices, and AI-led operational intelligence. The focus is on reducing downtime, improving operational visibility, and building resilient cloud and distributed environments that scale reliably over time.

sections.heading: [ What Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) services does Crest Data provide? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1692)
sections.content: Crest Data provides services across SRE implementation, observability, incident management, reliability automation, Kubernetes operations, cloud-native infrastructure, performance optimization, operational analytics, and AI-led reliability operations.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support cloud-native and Kubernetes-based SRE environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1693)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data helps enterprises implement SRE practices across Kubernetes, containers, microservices, hybrid cloud, and distributed infrastructure environments to improve scalability, resilience, and operational consistency.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data reduce operational downtime and improve incident response? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1694)
sections.content: Crest Data combines observability, intelligent alerting, automation, and operational analytics to help enterprises identify issues faster, improve root-cause analysis, reduce Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR), and strengthen overall operational response workflows.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI-led SRE and operational intelligence services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1695)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI-native operational intelligence into SRE environments to help enterprises improve anomaly detection, alert correlation, incident analysis, operational automation, and predictive reliability operations across cloud and infrastructure ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ Which observability and cloud platforms does Crest Data support for SRE operations? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1696)
sections.content: Crest Data works across enterprise observability and cloud ecosystems including Datadog, Dynatrace, Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, and Kubernetes-based environments.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide ongoing SRE and managed reliability operations support? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1697)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data provides ongoing reliability engineering, observability optimization, incident management support, operational automation, monitoring, and managed SRE services to help enterprises maintain stable and scalable production environments.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other enterprise SRE service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/site-reliability-engineering-sre/#collapse-1698)
sections.content: Crest Data combines SRE expertise with observability, AI-led operations, automation, cloud-native engineering, and enterprise-scale operational experience to help organizations build more proactive, resilient, and operationally mature environments.

sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

sections.heading: Leveraging Software Product Engineering to Drive Enterprise Innovation and Market Leadership
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Software Product Engineering

sections.heading: Inclusive software product engineering services
sections.content:
offered by Crest Data empower enterprises to offer innovative products designed to keep pace with changing market dynamics and technological advancements. In the current scenario where software has become a primary tenet that is associated with global innovations, our software product engineering services touch all aspects of the product lifecycle helping create scalable and secure products that drive business growth.
Through our enterprise software development services, we help you in your digital transformation journey to deliver world-class products to your customers by incorporating industry best practices, AI-infused practices, custom product development strategies and advanced technologies. Our product engineering approach bridges the gap between complex customer expectations, ideas and high-performing customer-centric solutions by leveraging our proven deep-expertise in creating digital engineering. 
![Softwrae solution](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Softwrae-solution.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for Software Product Engineering?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Proven Operational Excellence and Massive Cost Optimization ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-8571)
sections.content: Enterprises can witness optimized infrastructure performance and reduced administration costs by 60%.

sections.heading: [ Accelerated Time-to-Market with Agile Excellence ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-8572)
sections.content: Our product engineering services expedite development cycle helping enterprise go from ideation to production ready product.

sections.heading: [ Proven Enterprise-scale Delivery ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-8573)
sections.content: Enterprises can reduce integration risk and accelerate product adoption with our deep experience in successfully delivering 5000+ integrations.

sections.heading: [ Deep Expertise in AI-Infused Engineering ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-8574)
sections.content: We leverage cutting-edge Gen AI, AI Agents, and agentic workflows to help enterprises increase engineering productivity and reduce development cycles.

sections.heading: [ Enterprise-Grade Security, Scalability and Compliance ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-8575)
sections.content: With security embedded in our product engineering approach, our expertise in DevSecOps and leading security platforms help enterprises mitigate potential security risks early.

sections.heading: Enterprise Integrations​
sections.content:
Streamline your operations and enhance productivity with over 5,000+ successful enterprise integrations. Our enterprise integration solutions help create seamless communication between your business applications, ensuring data consistency and accessibility.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/enterprise-integrations/)

sections.heading: Custom Application Development
sections.content:
Realize your unique software vision with fully customized solutions that perfectly fit your unique business requirements. From initial conceptualization to final deployment, our enterprise software development team employs the latest technologies and methodologies to bring your custom software vision to life.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/custom-application-development/)

sections.heading: Enterprise Migrations
sections.content:
Implement a seamless and secure transition across various security and observability platforms with our enterprise migration solutions. Our domain experts design customized migration strategies using AI-led practices reducing risk of data loss, ensuring high data integrity and maintaining high standards of security.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/migrations/)

sections.heading: Integrated DevOps Services
sections.content:
Accelerate your software development lifecycle with our integrated DevOps services. We optimize your operations for efficiency, security and reliability, leveraging automation, continuous integration, and continuous delivery practices to enhance collaboration and productivity.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/devops-automation/)

sections.heading: IT Service Management
sections.content:
Gain holistic visibility into your multi-vendor IT environments with our managed ITSM services. We also act as a strategic partner, providing managed ITSM services for Day 2 operations. Our offerings, including comprehensive ITSM administration and IT operations monitoring provide rapid ROI, platform stability and operational stability. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/itsm/)

sections.heading: MCP Solutions
sections.content:
Realize the full potential of your AI agents with our enterprise-grade MCP server implementations. We provide a uniform framework that ensures seamless, reliable access between your AI system and all internal resources.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/mcp-solution/)

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data accelerate product development and time-to-market? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-2561)
sections.content: Crest Data leverages agile methodologies, AI-driven engineering practices, DevOps automation, and cloud-native architectures to help organizations move rapidly from ideation to production-ready products while maintaining scalability, security, and reliability.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data support AI-driven product engineering? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-2562)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data incorporates Gen AI, AI agents, and agentic workflows into its engineering approach to improve developer productivity, automate workflows, reduce development cycles, and accelerate enterprise innovation.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide enterprise integration services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-2563)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data has extensive experience delivering enterprise integrations that enable seamless communication between business applications, platforms, and workflows. Their expertise includes over 5,000 successful integrations across enterprise ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ What technologies and engineering approaches does Crest Data specialize in? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-2564)
sections.content: Crest Data specializes in cloud-native development, Kubernetes, microservices, API-first architectures, DevOps, AI engineering, workflow automation, observability, and enterprise security engineering.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide post-deployment support and managed services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-2565)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data offers end-to-end support from product conceptualization and development to deployment, optimization, managed services, and ongoing maintenance to ensure long-term product performance and operational stability.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data reduce engineering and operational overhead? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-2566)
sections.content: By leveraging AI-assisted development, workflow automation, observability, and DevOps best practices, Crest Data helps reduce manual engineering effort, streamline operations, and improve overall development efficiency.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data ensure security throughout the product engineering lifecycle? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/software-product-engineering/#collapse-2567)
sections.content: Security is integrated into every stage of development through DevSecOps practices, secure coding standards, compliance-focused engineering, continuous monitoring, and automated security testing.

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Strengthening Enterprise Analytics with Splunk Solutions
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Splunk

sections.heading: Navigating the exponential growth of data in this hyper-connected digital ecosystem demands an AI-native platform
sections.content:
that unifies intelligent observability with advanced security. Crest Data offers comprehensive Splunk services that extract intelligent, actionable insights from raw telemetry data into real-time operational intelligence, helping enterprises accelerate decision-making and realize measurable business value. 
​With an impressive portfolio of 20% of all applications on Splunkbase, our team of experienced engineers strives to deliver future-ready, scalable Splunk solutions across the entire lifecycle of architecture, development, deployment, and integration.
Our deep expertise in the enterprise security landscape spans advanced threat detection engineering, automated incident response, behavioral analytics, compliance monitoring, and security platform optimization, helping to build security ecosystems. With our Splunk managed services, we provide continuous monitoring of enterprise apps and IT infrastructure, proactive support, and flexible need-based consulting models to maximize the ROI from the Splunk investment.
![Splunk](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Splunk.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for Splunk Services?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Dominant Market Presence in App Development ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1691)
sections.content: Crest Data has built over **150 Splunk** apps and Technology Add-ons (TAs) that constitute a significant portion of all available content on Splunkbase.

sections.heading: [ Massive Dedicated Expert Workforce ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1692)
sections.content: A team of dedicated engineers with expertise and experience in managing complex Splunk development, deployment, integration, and migration projects.

sections.heading: [ Proven Cost Optimization ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1693)
sections.content: Enterprises can realize measurable financial and operational cost savings, as Crest Data can help reduce Splunk administration costs by **60%** while increasing uptime.

sections.heading: [ Extensive Implementation Experience ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1694)
sections.content: Crest Data has rich experience in completing over **50 large-scale** customer implementations. Our diverse portfolio includes catering to high-tech startups and established Fortune 500 companies.

sections.heading: Splunk Professional Services
sections.content:
Crest Data helps enterprises rapidly operationalize Splunk Implementation using the full Splunk suite – including Splunk Enterprise, Splunk Cloud Platform, Splunk Enterprise Security, Splunk observability, and Splunk UBA – by combining robust deployment practices with deep engineering execution to achieve digital resilience. Our expert teams design scalable architectures and lead hands-on development efforts through strategic consulting for custom data-onboarding pipelines, CIM-compliant field mappings, and risk-based alerting configurations. Holding expertise in correlation search engineering and behavioral model tuning, our team specializes in dashboard development and automation-driven SOC workflows. 
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-professional-services/)

sections.heading: Splunk Development and Integration
sections.content:
Crest Data leverages the capabilities of Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud Platform through focused integration and development services such as custom Splunk Apps and Technology Add-ons (TAs) for Splunk Enterprise and Cloud, certified connectors, and automation workflows. Our engineering team holds extensive expertise in CIM-compliant normalization, API-based integrations, and scalable application architecture that ensures reliable and high-performance of data pipelines. Through seamless integration with Splunk SIEM, Splunk SOAR, and Splunk Threat Intelligence Management, we help enterprises better streamline their orchestration and intelligence-driven security operations.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-development-services/)

sections.heading: Splunk Managed Services
sections.content:
Crest Data offers comprehensive Splunk managed services to keep your Splunk environment resilient and high-performing. By handling “Day 2” operations, we help enterprises maintain superior operational efficiency through our structured health checks, performance tuning, threat intelligence updates, infrastructure scaling support, integration maintenance, and detection engineering across Splunk Enterprise, Cloud, and Security platforms. By combining governance with hands-on engineering support and release validation, we help enterprises sustain uptime, optimize costs, and focus on strategic security priorities. Our need-based consulting models help enterprises to instantly access elite Splunk architects and consultants to deliver scalable solutions.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-managed-services/)

sections.heading: Splunk Migration
sections.content:
Crest Data offers robust migration services for seamless platform evolution with minimal disruption to upgrade legacy deployments to newer versions of Splunk Enterprise, transitioning to Splunk Cloud Platform, or modernizing development components. We provide strong support for version-to-version upgrades, app and TA compatibility remediation, dashboard framework migrations, and API-level integration updates. With sequential validation, regression testing, and performance evaluation, we prevent business interruptions while delivering clear gains in scalability, throughput, and future maintainability.
[ Read more ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-python-3-migration/)

sections.heading: [ Splunk Enterprise ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1801)
sections.content: Unlock the huge potential stored in your massive datasets by efficiently extracting machine-level intelligence through Splunk Enterprise. Our experts specialize in Splunk Enterprise to help you design scalable architectures, create robust data ingestion pipelines, develop powerful dashboards, alerts, and data visualizations, and receive deep insights into your operations. Harnessing our extensive engineering expertise, enterprises can accelerate decision-making, improve data visibility, and maximize their Splunk investment.

sections.heading: [ Splunk UBA ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1802)
sections.content: Splunk UBA (User Behavioral Analytics) helps enterprises identify insider threats and advanced security risks through behavioral analytics and anomaly detection. Crest Data provides dedicated engineering support across development, maintenance, release validation, and customer support functions. Crest actively collaborates with the product, support, and stakeholder teams across the globe to enhance platform performance, stability, and scalability, and provide deployment strategy consulting and installation and configuration guidance.

sections.heading: [ Splunk Threat Intelligence Management ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1803)
sections.content: Unifying threat intelligence from commercial, open-source, and proprietary providers, Splunk Threat Intelligence Management enables security teams using Splunk and Splunk Enterprise Security to identify and mitigate threats in real time. As a trusted Splunk partner, Crest Data has been instrumental in developing and managing key integrations for Splunk Threat Intelligence Management. Our deep and extensive expertise in intelligence engineering, enrichment, standardization, and automation helps enterprises transform fragmented data into actionable security outcomes.

sections.heading: [ Splunk SOAR ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1804)
sections.content: Splunk SOAR (formerly Splunk Phantom) empowers enterprises to automate and orchestrate security operations from alert triage through incident response. Crest Data specializes in managing and enhancing integrations that power the automation ecosystems. Having managed 300+ integrations and contributed to the Splunk-supported and vendor-supported connectors on the Splunk Marketplace, Crest Data’s expertise includes integration development, long-term maintenance, and certification support.

sections.heading: [ Splunk Observability Cloud  ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1805)
sections.content: Crest Data utilizes Splunk Observability Cloud to perform real-time, cloud-native monitoring across infrastructure, applications, microservices, and Kubernetes. Specializing in distributed tracing, APM, real-time metrics monitoring, and log correlation, we help enterprises gain end-to-end visibility from code to user experience. Our engineers guarantee seamless performance tuning, anomaly detection configuration, and scalable architecture design for modern cloud ecosystems. By leveraging intelligent alerting and automated workflows, enterprises can proactively detect performance bottlenecks, expedite root cause analysis, and optimize digital experiences.

sections.heading: [ Splunk IT Service Intelligence (ITSI) ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-1806)
sections.content: Crest Data leverages Splunk IT Service Intelligence to help enterprises gain comprehensive visibility into business-critical services, linking IT performance with business outcomes. We help design service-centric monitoring frameworks using KPIs, service trees, glass tables, and adaptive thresholding to deliver contextual insights. By implementing event correlation, notable event aggregation, and intelligent alerting, our experts reduce noise and improve incident response. Through proactive health scoring, predictive analytics, and performance optimization, we empower enterprises to reduce downtime, ensure SLA adherence, and strengthen overall operational resilience.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations maximize the value of their Splunk investment? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-2041)
sections.content:
Many organizations deploy Splunk for logging or security monitoring but never fully utilize its capabilities.
Crest Data helps enterprises operationalize Splunk across security, observability, and IT operations by improving data onboarding, dashboarding, detection engineering, automation, and operational workflows. The goal is to transform machine data into actionable intelligence that drives faster decisions and better business outcomes.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data develop custom Splunk Apps and Technology Add-ons (TAs)? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-2042)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data is one of the most experienced Splunk development partners in the ecosystem, having built more than 150 Splunk Apps and Technology Add-ons.
We help organizations create custom integrations, dashboards, workflows, and data onboarding solutions that extend Splunk's capabilities and address unique business and operational requirements.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help improve security operations with Splunk Enterprise Security? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-2043)
sections.content:
Crest Data helps organizations strengthen security operations through detection engineering, correlation search development, threat intelligence integration, risk-based alerting, and SOC workflow automation.
Our team helps security teams reduce alert noise, improve threat visibility, and accelerate investigation and response processes within Splunk Enterprise Security environments.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data support Splunk SOAR and security automation initiatives? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-2044)
sections.content:
Crest Data helps organizations automate security operations by integrating Splunk SOAR with security tools, threat intelligence platforms, and operational workflows.
With extensive experience managing hundreds of integrations, we help enterprises streamline incident response, reduce manual effort, and improve security operations efficiency through automation.

sections.heading: [ Can Crest Data help organizations migrate to Splunk Cloud or modernize existing Splunk environments? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-2045)
sections.content:
Yes. Crest Data provides migration services for Splunk Cloud adoption, version upgrades, platform modernization, dashboard migrations, app compatibility remediation, and integration updates.
Our structured migration approach helps organizations modernize their Splunk environments while minimizing operational disruption and risk.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other Splunk service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-2046)
sections.content:
Crest Data has one of the largest dedicated Splunk engineering teams in the industry, with experience spanning 150+ Splunk Apps and TAs, 50+ enterprise implementations, and contributions that represent a significant portion of the Splunkbase ecosystem.
Beyond implementation, we help organizations build, integrate, optimize, migrate, and manage Splunk environments across security, observability, and IT operations—delivering long-term operational value from the platform.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help organizations adopt AI and automation within Splunk? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/splunk/#collapse-2047)
sections.content: Crest Data helps organizations leverage automation, intelligent alerting, threat intelligence, behavioral analytics, SOAR workflows, and AI-driven operational processes to improve security operations and observability outcomes.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. sections.content:

He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.

sections.content:

Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Delivering AI-Driven Enterprise Workflow Automation at Scale
sections.content:
1. [Home](https://www.crestdata.ai)
  2. [Solutions](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/)
  3. Workflow Automation

sections.heading: Crest Data helps enterprises simplify complex operations and accelerate digital execution through workflow automation.
sections.content:
We design, implement, and modernize enterprise workflow automation across platforms to reduce manual effort, improve accuracy, and drive operational resilience. Our automation-first approach combines deep platform expertise, AI-driven decisioning, and scalable architectures to deliver workflow automation solutions that streamline IT, employee, and customer workflows. From modernizing legacy processes to enabling intelligent agents and real-time insights, we apply business process automation principles to ensure workflows are upgrade-ready, data-driven, and built for scale. With strong capabilities across ServiceNow and enterprise ecosystems, Crest Data enables organizations to deploy AI-driven workflow automation faster and continuously optimize business-critical workflows. 
![Workflow Automation](https://www.crestdata.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Workflow-Automation.webp)

sections.heading: Why Crest Data for Workflow Automation?
sections.content: ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201040%201108'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: [ Enterprise Workflow Automation at Scale ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1541)
sections.content: Proven experience automating complex, multi-step workflows across ITSM, security, employee services, and business functions reducing wait times from minutes to seconds in production environments

sections.heading: [ Proven Outcomes ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1542)
sections.content: **500+ projects delivered** , spanning workflow implementation, modernization, and automation across IT and business functions

sections.heading: [ Integration at Scale ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1543)
sections.content: **300+** ServiceNow integrations implemented to enable seamless business process automation, workflow orchestration, and data consistency

sections.heading: [ Deep ITSM & CMDB Expertise ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1544)
sections.content: Strong domain depth across ITSM, ITOM, CMDB, and service operations, ensuring workflows align with real-world operational dependencies

sections.heading: [ SecOps Domain Expertise ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1545)
sections.content:
Strong experience across Security Incident Response and Vulnerability Response workflows, including threat intelligence, AVR, CVR, Configuration Compliance, and Patch Orchestration at enterprise scale
[ Learn More About Servicenow Workflow Automation  ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/servicenow/)

sections.heading: Workflow Automation Consulting
sections.content: We provide workflow automation consulting to help enterprises define the right strategy, architecture, and execution roadmap. Our experts assess existing processes, identify automation opportunities, and design scalable, AI-driven workflow automation aligned to ITSM, ITOM, CMDB, and business workflows. From platform assessments and governance frameworks to integration strategy and change enablement, we guide organizations toward optimized workflows, faster adoption, and measurable operational outcomes ensuring long-term value from their workflow automation investments.

sections.heading: Enterprise Workflow Platform Implementation
sections.content: We implement ServiceNow-based enterprise workflow platforms through deep configuration, custom development, and platform-level customization, tailoring workflows, data models, and user experiences to align with business processes and operational needs. Our approach starts with understanding business processes across IT, HR, and customer operations, followed by configuration aligned to platform best practices. This enables faster go-lives, reduced rework, and a foundation that supports future enhancements without disrupting existing workflows.

sections.heading: Enterprise Integrations & Data Connectivity
sections.content: We design and implement robust integrations connecting ServiceNow with enterprise systems to ensure workflows move seamlessly across platforms. Our integrations span identity systems, monitoring tools, data sources, and business applications using REST, SOAP, JDBC, LDAP, and other standards. This enables unified ServiceNow-led workflows, accurate data exchange, and end-to-end automation without integration sprawl.

sections.heading: Platform Optimization & Support
sections.content: We provide ongoing platform administration, optimization, and L1/L2 support to keep workflows running reliably. Our services include configuration management, performance tuning, upgrades, incident handling, and root cause analysis. With access to certified consultants, organizations can offload day-to-day platform operations while ensuring stability, continuous improvement, and alignment with evolving business needs.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data help enterprises improve operational efficiency through workflow automation? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1601)
sections.content:
Crest Data helps enterprises streamline repetitive and complex operational processes through workflow automation, AI-led operations, and enterprise system integration.
By automating workflows across IT operations, cloud environments, approvals, incident management, and service operations, organizations can reduce manual effort, improve process consistency, and accelerate operational execution at scale.

sections.heading: [ What workflow automation services does Crest Data provide? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1602)
sections.content: Crest Data provides services across IT workflow automation, process orchestration, incident automation, AI-led operational workflows, approval automation, service operations automation, DevOps automation, cloud operations automation, and enterprise workflow modernization.

sections.heading: [ Which enterprise workflow and automation platforms does Crest Data support? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1603)
sections.content:
Crest Data works across enterprise workflow, ITSM, cloud, and operational ecosystems including ServiceNow, Datadog, Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud.
We help enterprises integrate workflows across cloud operations, observability, IT operations, DevOps, and enterprise systems to improve operational scalability and efficiency.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data automate complex workflows across enterprise systems? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1604)
sections.content:
Modern enterprise workflows often span multiple applications, APIs, operational teams, and cloud environments.
Crest Data helps organizations automate and orchestrate these workflows through integrated automation frameworks, operational intelligence, and scalable process automation practices designed for distributed enterprise ecosystems.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide AI-led workflow automation services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1605)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data integrates AI-native operational intelligence into workflow automation environments to help enterprises automate dynamic processes, improve operational decision-making, accelerate incident workflows, and reduce repetitive manual coordination across teams and systems.

sections.heading: [ How does Crest Data improve workflow visibility and operational monitoring? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1606)
sections.content: Crest Data combines observability, automation, operational analytics, and workflow intelligence to help enterprises gain better visibility into workflow performance, process bottlenecks, operational dependencies, and automation reliability across distributed systems.

sections.heading: [ Does Crest Data provide managed workflow automation and operational support services? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1607)
sections.content: Yes. Crest Data provides ongoing workflow optimization, automation support, monitoring, operational management, process enhancement, and managed services to help enterprises maintain scalable and reliable automation ecosystems over time.

sections.heading: [ What makes Crest Data different from other workflow automation service providers? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1608)
sections.content: Crest Data combines workflow automation, AI-led operations, observability, cloud-native engineering, DevOps, and enterprise integration expertise to help organizations build scalable automation ecosystems that improve operational efficiency and long-term operational resilience.

sections.heading: [ Why do organizations choose Crest Data instead of building ServiceNow workflows internally? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/solutions/workflow-automation/#collapse-1609)
sections.content: Many organizations find that internal teams are constrained by bandwidth, specialized platform knowledge, or integration complexity. Crest Data provides access to experienced ServiceNow architects, developers, and workflow automation experts who help accelerate delivery while reducing implementation risks.

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.

![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.

![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
