![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: The Splunk to Datadog Migration App by Crest Data simplifies the process of moving your monitoring and logging data from Splunk to Datadog
sections.content: Our solution automates the transformation of visualizations, alerts, and data queries, from Splunk SPL to Datadog specific formats, ensuring that your data remains consistent and accurate throughout the transition. This tool enables seamless adaptation of your existing Splunk setups to Datadog’s powerful observability platform, reducing the complexity and risk involved in manual migration processes.

sections.heading: Splunk to Datadog
sections.content: Migration Demo

sections.heading: [ What are the key differences between Splunk and Datadog? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-2561)
sections.content:
If you have worked with both, the difference is pretty clear. Splunk is incredibly powerful when it comes to log analysis and security use cases, but it can feel heavy and a bit complex to manage at scale. 
Datadog, on the other hand, feels more straightforward. It brings everything; metrics, logs, traces into one place and is generally quicker to get up and running. 
Most teams end up choosing based on what they value more: depth and control, or speed and simplicity.

sections.heading: [ What does a Splunk to Datadog migration involve? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-2562)
sections.content:
It’s not just a data move, it's more like rebuilding your setup in a new system, without losing what already works.
You’re moving dashboards, alerts, saved searches, and pipelines. The tricky part is translating Splunk queries into something Datadog understands and making sure dashboards still make sense.
Done manually, it’s time-consuming. With automation, most of that heavy lifting gets handled, and your team doesn’t have to start from scratch.

sections.heading: [ Does Cisco own Splunk now? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-2563)
sections.content:
Yes, that’s already happened. Cisco completed its acquisition of Splunk in March 2024.
For most users, nothing changed overnight. But it has definitely made teams pause and think about the long term, especially around pricing, integrations, and where the product is headed.
Some are staying with Splunk, others are exploring alternatives. It really depends on what direction the business wants to take.

sections.heading: [ Is Splunk a SIEM, and does Datadog support that too? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-2564)
sections.content:
Yes, Splunk has been used as a SIEM for years, especially with its Enterprise Security setup. That’s one of its strongest areas.
Datadog can handle similar use cases now with its Cloud SIEM. It may not feel identical, but it covers detection, monitoring, and investigation pretty well.
The important part during a migration is making sure those detection rules and workflows don’t get lost in the process.

sections.heading: [ How long does a Splunk to Datadog migration usually take? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-2565)
sections.content:
There’s no one-size answer, but for most teams, it lands somewhere between 4 to 8 weeks.
A lot depends on how complex your current setup is; how many dashboards, alerts, and integrations you’re running.
If you try to do everything manually, it can stretch much longer. With the right tools and a clear plan, it’s usually faster and far less painful.

sections.heading: [ What is Datadog Bits AI, and where does it fit in after migration? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-datadog-migration/#collapse-2566)
sections.content:
Datadog Bits AI is Datadog's suite of AI-powered agents designed to help engineering teams spend less time digging through data.
It looks at your alerts, logs, and system behavior and helps surface what actually matters like possible root causes or next steps.
Once you’ve migrated, it starts working on top of your existing setup. So instead of changing how your team works, it quietly makes things faster and easier behind the scenes.

sections.content: Designed to meet evolving customer needs, the Crest Data - Dynatrace partnership includes plans to broaden migration support beyond dashboards and alerts.

sections.heading: [ What is Dynatrace? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-dynatrace-migrations/#collapse-2091)
sections.content:
Dynatrace is an AI-powered observability and application performance management (APM) platform. It provides full-stack monitoring across applications, infrastructure, cloud environments, and user experience, all underpinned by Davis AI, Dynatrace's automated root cause analysis engine that continuously monitors your environment and surfaces actionable insights.
Dynatrace is designed for big and complicated company systems, and it's known for being one of the best in its field, according to the Gartner Magic Quadrant for APM and Observability. When companies decide to switch from Splunk to Dynatrace, it's usually part of a bigger plan to update their observability systems. The engineers at Crest Data are experts in Dynatrace and have helped lots of big companies make the switch, with real results that you can read about in our case studies.

sections.heading: [ What does Dynatrace do? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-dynatrace-migrations/#collapse-2092)
sections.content:
Dynatrace provides end-to-end observability across your entire technology stack. Key capabilities include:
**Application Performance Monitoring (APM) —** traces application transactions end-to-end, from the user's browser through to backend services and databases.
**Infrastructure Monitoring —** collects metrics from hosts, containers, Kubernetes clusters, and cloud services with automatic topology discovery.
**Log Management —** ingests and contextualises log data alongside metrics and traces for correlated analysis.
**Digital Experience Monitoring —** tracks real user interactions and synthetic test results across web and mobile.
**Security —** provides runtime application security and vulnerability detection through Dynatrace Application Security.
When migrating from Splunk, Crest Data maps your existing Splunk dashboards, alerts, and saved searches to the equivalent Dynatrace capabilities, ensuring continuity of your monitoring coverage from day one.

sections.heading: [ Does Dynatrace support OpenTelemetry? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-dynatrace-migrations/#collapse-2093)
sections.content:
So, Dynatrace is really into OpenTelemetry - they support it fully and are even helping to make it better. This means Dynatrace can easily take in all the data it needs from OpenTelemetry, like traces, metrics, and logs, and it works with any app or service that uses the standard OpenTelemetry tools.
For organizations migrating from Splunk who are also planning to standardize on OpenTelemetry for future instrumentation, Crest Data's migration process includes configuring your Dynatrace environment to receive both legacy Splunk-forwarded data and new OTel-instrumented telemetry simultaneously ensuring a smooth transition without any observability gaps during the migration period.

sections.heading: [ How does Dynatrace OneAgent work? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-dynatrace-migrations/#collapse-2094)
sections.content:
Dynatrace has this thing called OneAgent - it's like a special tool that you put on each computer or server you want to keep an eye on. This can be a virtual machine, a regular server, or even a Kubernetes node. When you install OneAgent, it automatically figures out what's running on that computer, like all the different programs and services, and how they're all connected. Then, it starts collecting lots of information, like metrics, traces, and logs, without you having to set it up for each individual service. It just does it all on its own, making it really easy to get a clear picture of what's going on.
OneAgent communicates with the Dynatrace platform via ActiveGate, a secure communication layer that handles data routing and encryption. During a Splunk to Dynatrace migration, deploying OneAgent across your environment is typically completed in the early phases, it immediately begins building a live topology map of your infrastructure, which forms the foundation for your new observability setup and accelerates the overall migration timeline.

sections.heading: [ How long does a Splunk to Dynatrace migration take? ](https://www.crestdata.ai/splunk-to-dynatrace-migrations/#collapse-2095)
sections.content:
Moving from Splunk to Dynatrace with Crest Data usually takes around 4 to 10 weeks. This time frame depends on a few things: how many dashboards and alerts you have set up in Splunk, the types of data you're working with, and how complex your infrastructure is for deploying OneAgent. The more you have to migrate, the longer it's going to take.
Here's how it works: Crest Data uses a special tool that automatically converts Splunk dashboards and searches into Dynatrace format. At the same time, our experts who are certified in Dynatrace take care of setting up the OneAgent and configuring the environment. We've already helped over 100 companies move to a new platform, and we have a detailed case study that shows how we did it with one of our clients who switched from Splunk to Dynatrace - we can share it with you if you're interested. Before we start any project, we do a free assessment to figure out exactly what needs to be done and how long it will take.

With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

![Sumeet Mathur](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20300'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A distinguished technology leader with deep expertise in enterprise software and product engineering, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. Sumeet is Managing Director of ServiceNow’s India Technology Centre and Senior Vice President of Engineering for the Core Business Workflows portfolio, overseeing products across HR, Finance & Supply Chain, Workplace, Health & Safety, Legal, and Contract Lifecycle Management. Previously, he held senior leadership roles at Broadcom, Cisco, and CA Technologies, scaling teams behind multi-billion-dollar product portfolios. He holds a degree in Computer Science and serves as Chair of the Telangana Regional Council at NASSCOM.
X 
![David Willis](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20300%20300'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Advisor
sections.content:
A strategic business, security, and technology leader with over 25 years of experience across telecommunications, financial services, and software industry verticals, he serves on Crest Data’s Board of Advisors. He currently serves as Vice President and Head of Technology Integrations, Technology Alliances at Netskope, driving strategic security and IT integrations at scale and advancing Netskope Cloud Exchange, recognized as a 2021 CRN Top 10 Cloud Security Tool. Previously, he held leadership roles at AT&T, Riverbed, and Palo Alto Networks, building strategic partner ecosystems and enterprise security programs. A former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, he actively advises and mentors several technology and consumer services companies.
X 
![Aditya K](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Support
sections.content:
Aditya Khetan is a Director of Technical Support with over 12 years of experience leading 24×7 global product support operations and customer success initiatives. He has built and scaled high‑performing teams, driving data‑informed improvements in NPS, CSAT, and operational efficiency while managing complex escalations. A Splunk Core Certified Consultant and Architect, Aditya has delivered enterprise solutions for global clients and partners closely with senior leadership to align support strategy with business goals.
X 
![Rajeev-1](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development
sections.content:
Brings extensive sales, business development, and consulting expertise to Crest Data, where he drives strategic growth and builds high‑value enterprise relationships across ServiceNow and IT solutions. With a strong background in strategic alliances and solution‑led sales, he focuses on expanding market presence and partnership ecosystems. Rajeev has a proven track record of engaging C‑suite stakeholders, shaping go‑to‑market strategies, and accelerating revenue in competitive technology markets. His leadership blends commercial acumen with deep industry insight.
X 
![Mike](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
sections.content:
Bringing over 20 years of experience in information technology and cybersecurity. He has held senior leadership roles across strategic alliances, technical operations, and information security, including positions at VMRay, Cofense, and financial services firms. A long-time faculty member at IANS Research and owner of First Security Alliance, LLC, he has advised hundreds of clients, authored professional publications, and spoken at numerous security conferences. He holds CISSP, CISM, CRISC certifications and an MS in Information Assurance from Walsh College.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, WW Technical Sales
sections.content:
Jeet has over a decade of experience across Security Engineering, Implementations, and Operations. As Director of Business Development at Crest Data Systems, he leads the Tech Sales organization, driving growth, solution positioning, and strategic customer engagement. Previously, Jeet led Managed Services teams and delivered more than 100 Professional Services engagements, specializing in deploying, optimizing, and migrating enterprise security platforms such as SIEM, XDR, and UEBA. His blend of technical expertise and consultative sales leadership enables strong customer relationships and measurable business outcomes.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Senior Director, US West Sales
sections.content:
Damion Desai leads West Coast North American sales for Crest Data, based out of San Jose. With over 25 years of experience in enterprise technology sales spanning semiconductors, optics, manufacturing and software services Damion partners closely with our engineering teams to deliver AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to some of the largest technology companies in Silicon Valley. He is a past winner of the Intel Achievement Award and holds a Computer Science degree from The University of Southern California.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Marketing
sections.content:
Neha Mashruwala is a highly organized and results-oriented marketing strategist with nearly two decades of experience in driving business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.
Known for aligning marketing strategy with business objectives, Neha brings deep expertise across brand strategy, demand gen and lead gen, product marketing, thought leadership, and end-to-end digital marketing. With a strong understanding of enterprise technology, AI-led marketing, creative storytelling, and data-driven execution, she accelerates go-to-market success with a customer-first mindset.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
sections.content:
A Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), she brings over 10 years of experience in corporate governance, secretarial practice, corporate restructuring and transaction advisory, fund raising including IPOs, and capital market transactions. With strong legal acumen, she advises the Board of Directors, ensures compliance with applicable legal and regulatory frameworks, and oversees governance systems across the organization, thereby supporting Crest Data’s commitment to transparency, accountability, and responsible business conduct.
X 
![Gayatri Khandelwal](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP of Sales
sections.content:
Gaytri brings over 25 years of experience driving revenue growth and customer success across global enterprises. She has led large-scale GTM initiatives, including managing over $100 mn Hi-Tech portfolio as Vice President of Sales at Genpact, and held senior sales leadership roles across leading enterprise technology organizations such as Cisco and Salesforce. An IIT Delhi engineering gold medalist, Gaytri blends technical depth with strategic sales leadership to build trusted C-suite relationships and drive sustained, long-term growth.
X 
![Rishi](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development, US West
sections.content:
Rishi leads strategic partnerships with observability vendors, including AWS, Datadog, and Dynatrace. He brings over 20 years of experience building products, partnerships, and driving customer success across the observability, security, and application infrastructure domains. Most recently, Rishi led product management and customer success teams at PromptQL and Sumo Logic, supporting thousands of customers from Fortune 500 enterprises to emerging startups. He lives in Sacramento, CA with his family and enjoys the outdoors.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: VP, Engineering
sections.content:
Bringing over 15 years of experience in cloud and DevOps engineering, he leads technology strategy and execution across product development and deployment at Crest Data. He has expertise in Kubernetes, containers, and multi-cloud architectures, building platforms for performance and scale. Prior to Crest Data, he co-founded and served as CTO of a cloud-native technology company recognized as a Great Place to Work. Colwin holds a Bachelor’s in Computer Science and multiple Kubernetes and AWS certifications.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, Business Development​
sections.content:
As the leader of Business Development and Security Ecosystem at Crest Data, Vance leverages over 25 years of experience in security technology. He previously served as a product manager at Armis, driving technical alliances and integrations, and at Nozomi Networks, where he managed protocols and hardware. Vance holds CISSP and CCSP certifications and a Bachelor’s in Physics and a Master’s in Computer Science from Rochester Institute of Technology. He holds a patent in photoprint digitizing scanner technology. Combining his deep technical expertise with strategic leadership he is deeply involved with customers and ISVs to build innovative Cybersecurity solutions.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, IT
sections.content:
With over a decade of experience in IT leadership, he oversees enterprise IT infrastructure, cloud operations, and cybersecurity at Crest Data. He leads a cross-functional IT organization, driving secure, scalable, and resilient systems while enabling key security certifications including ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and BIA. With deep expertise across AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI-driven security tools, he focuses on strengthening endpoint security, managing inhouse data centers, optimizing cloud costs, and ensuring reliable, well-governed IT operations across the organization.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20400%20500'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Director, HR
sections.content:
An HR leader deeply committed to people and culture, Devanshi brings over a decade of experience across diverse industries. As Director, HR at Crest Data, she drives culture-first people practices and builds high-impact HR teams aligned with business outcomes across India and the US teams. Known for her sharp insight, empathy, and storytelling-driven influence, she blends strategy with human connection. Outside of work, she cherishes time with her little one, enjoys playing cricket, and loves reading to him.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Chief Financial Officer
sections.content:
With more than 25 years of leadership experience in finance, he oversees financial strategy and operations across domestic and international business units. He leads enterprise-wide financial governance, compliance, and growth planning. With deep expertise across finance, taxation, legal operations, procurement, and revenue assurance, he has helped build and scale businesses, including a technology startup in video analytics. Nirav holds an M.Com, CA, a Diploma in Foreign Exchange Risk Management, and is a D&B Certified IFRS Professional.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Techology Officer
sections.content:
With over 25 years of global experience across technology leadership, large-scale product engineering, and operational excellence. She defines and drives Crest Data’s engineering vision and execution across data and AI foundation for security, observability, automation, and cloud domains. Prior to Crest Data, Neha held senior engineering leadership roles at Cisco and other organizations. She has received several engineering awards including Cisco’s Pioneer award and holds a patent in networking security.
Neha holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Computer Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.
X 
![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%20350%20350'%2F%3E)

sections.heading: Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
sections.content:
Malhar defines the vision and drives a customer-first, agile, and empowering culture rooted in equality and continuous learning. With over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership, Malhar drives strategic growth in data and AI, security, DevOps, and cloud spaces while fostering innovation and team excellence at Crest Data. His strategic leadership positions Crest Data as an AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients’ success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
Prior to founding Crest, Malhar held leadership roles in product management at Cisco’s Insieme Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2013) and Nuova Business Unit (acquired by Cisco in 2008) where he led the growth of Cisco’s Data Center Switching business from inception to an annualized revenue of over $1.5 bn.
Malhar holds a bachelor’s engineering degree in Civil Engineering from Gujarat University and a Master’s degree in Computer Networking from North Carolina State University.

sections.heading: Pravesh Bajpai
sections.content:
3d 
[ Jay Patel reposted this  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/pravesh-bajpai-852a4085_kubecon-kubeconindia-cloudnative-activity-7473394443585343488-Wby_)
Day 1 at KubeCon + CloudNativeCon India 2026 with some brilliant colleagues from [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_profile__posts-text) - [Jay Patel](https://in.linkedin.com/in/jay-patel-173505220?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Abhishek Oberoi](https://in.linkedin.com/in/iabhishekoberoi?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Keyur Barot](https://in.linkedin.com/in/keyur-barot-472038172?trk=public_profile__posts-text) and [Ishan Mahadevia](https://in.linkedin.com/in/ishan139?trk=public_profile__posts-text) It was indeed an incredible experience filled with learning, networking, and thought-provoking discussions around the future of cloud-native technologies. The sessions and conversations reinforced how rapidly the ecosystem is evolving across Kubernetes, Platform Engineering, Observability, Security, AI-driven Operations, and Distributed Systems. Key themes that stood out: - Kubernetes at scale - Platform Engineering - Observability & AI-driven Operations - Security by design - Distributed databases powering the next generation of resilient and globally scalable applications A major highlight of the day was engaging with leaders, engineers, architects, and innovators from across the ecosystem, including teams from [Cast AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/cast-ai?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Chainguard](https://www.linkedin.com/company/chainguard-dev?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Microsoft Azure](https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/microsoft-azure/?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [VMware](https://www.linkedin.com/company/vmware?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [ClickHouse](https://www.linkedin.com/company/clickhouseinc?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Intuit](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuit?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [NeevCloud®](https://in.linkedin.com/company/neevcloud-india?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Vultr](https://www.linkedin.com/company/vultr?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [DevZero](https://www.linkedin.com/company/devzerohq?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Grafana Labs](https://www.linkedin.com/company/grafana-labs?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [KodeKloud](https://sg.linkedin.com/company/kodekloud?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [The Linux Foundation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-linux-foundation?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Nutanix](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nutanix?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [OpenSearch Project](https://www.linkedin.com/company/opensearch-project?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Sonatype](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sonatype?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Yugabyte](https://www.linkedin.com/company/yugabyte?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Archestra.AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/archestra-ai?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [CoreEdge](https://in.linkedin.com/company/coreedgehq?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [DrDroid](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dr-droid?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [National Payments Corporation Of India (NPCI)](https://in.linkedin.com/company/npci?trk=public_profile__posts-text) and many other members of the cloud-native community. Events like KubeCon are a reminder that while technology continues to evolve rapidly, it is the collaboration between communities, organizations, and individuals that truly drives innovation. Special thanks to [Julian Gordon](https://hk.linkedin.com/in/julian-gordon-12a2a3?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Patti J.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/patti-j-0430965?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Toddy Mladenov](https://www.linkedin.com/in/toddysm?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Tittu Varghese](https://in.linkedin.com/in/tittuvarghese?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Siddarth Jain](https://in.linkedin.com/in/siddarth-jain227?trk=public_profile__posts-text), [Innokentii Konstantinov](https://uk.linkedin.com/in/innokentii-konstantinov?trk=public_profile__posts-text) and [Margaret Rimek](https://pt.linkedin.com/in/margaret-rimek?trk=public_profile__posts-text) for sharing their insights on AI, platform engineering, observability, and distributed databases. Looking forward to Day 2 and more opportunities to learn, connect, and contribute. [#KubeCon](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fkubecon&trk=public_profile__posts-text) We kicked off the year with a clear message at our All Hands: becoming AI-native is our shared opportunity. We have a clear path of what needs to be achieved and how to get there. This shift transcends across all the groups; it empowers everyone to think freely, learn, and set new benchmarks of quality and productivity with AI. In this rapidly changing environment, we are prepared to navigate the shift, guided by the principle of [#ContinuousLearning](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcontinuouslearning&trk=public_profile__posts-text)—constantly learning, applying knowledge, and adapting as we progress. 2025 at Crest Data - Defined by Moments, Not Months! - Moments of collaboration. - Moments of impact. - Moments that brought people, purpose, and progress together. From strengthening our AI and data capabilities to giving back to the community, engaging with the global tech ecosystem, and investing in the well-being of our teams, each step shaped who we are today. Thank you to everyone who made this year meaningful. Here’s to the journeys we’ll share in 2026. 5mo 
[ Jay Patel reposted this  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/yash-somani-05502ab2_sre-devops-kubernetes-activity-7410280144101179392-ul9K)
🚀 [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_profile__posts-text) is Hiring - Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) || Ahmedabad Looking for an SRE passionate about reliability + automation + production scale, backed by strong DevOps engineering experience. 📍 Location: Ahmedabad 💼 Experience: 5+ years 🧠 Core Tech We Care About • AWS or GCP • Terraform / Terragrunt • Kubernetes + Helm • Any CI/CD (Jenkins / ArgoCD / GitLab etc.) • Any Config Management (Ansible / Salt / Puppet etc.) • Prometheus + Grafana + ELK • Linux + Networking + Distributed system fundamentals • Scripting: Python or Go 🎯 What You’ll Do • Make systems reliable and wildly scalable • Build & own automation, runbooks, SLIs, SLOs & observability • Push production changes confidently under pressure • Work with internal + customer teams like an owner, not a ticket taker • Drive reliability, latency, operational risk, and system performance If uptime, latency, automation, and operational risk excite you more than buzzwords and dashboards — we should talk. 📩 Interested or know someone perfect for this role? Share your resume at yash.somani@crestdata.ai or DM me directly !! Thrilled to share that I have received my U.S. B1/B2 Visa! 🇺🇸 This marks an important milestone for me and for the work I am doing at Crest Data. The visa approval opens up opportunities for: 🤝 In-person business meetings and strategic discussions with our sales leadership, partners, and customers of our organisation 🌎 Attending conferences, workshops, and industry events to stay ahead of emerging trends, making valuable professional industry connections, explore new business opportunities, and identify partnership avenues for our organisation Grateful for the support from my team and Crest Data leadership throughout the process. Looking forward to representing our organization, exploring new opportunities, and strengthening global partnerships. Onwards and upwards! ✨ [#USVisa](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fusvisa&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#BusinessTravel](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fbusinesstravel&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#B1B2](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fb1b2&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#CrestData](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcrestdata&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#TeamCrest](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fteamcrest&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#Partnerships](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fpartnerships&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#TechnologyLeadership](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ftechnologyleadership&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#GlobalBusiness](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fglobalbusiness&trk=public_profile__posts-text)[...more](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/jay-patel-173505220_usvisa-businesstravel-b1b2-activity-7400271359529926656-QXwN)

Enterprises today are feeling the strain of legacy monitoring slow migrations, rising costs, and endless manual work. Automation is changing that. By automating your move to Datadog, you can accelerate migration by up to 60%, convert 90% of assets seamlessly, and free your teams to focus on innovation. Crest Data recently helped a Fortune 500 company migrate 1,500+ dashboards and 100TB of data in just two weeks. - Ready to accelerate your Datadog migration? - Learn more: [https://lnkd.in/d8XbWNCV](https://lnkd.in/d8XbWNCV?trk=public_profile__posts-text) - Connect with us at info@crestdata.ai [#DatadogMigration](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fdatadogmigration&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#CloudMigration](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcloudmigration&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#AutomationInTech](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fautomationintech&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#EnterpriseSolutions](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fenterprisesolutions&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#CrestData](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcrestdata&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#Fortune500](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ffortune500&trk=public_profile__posts-text)[...more](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/crest-data_automate-migration-to-datadog-caraouselpdf-activity-7394338462742646784-lTry)[...more](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/crest-data_automate-migration-to-datadog-caraouselpdf-activity-7394338462742646784-lTry)

Crest Data Achieves the AWS Competency: [https://lnkd.in/d8FZm2aA](https://lnkd.in/d8FZm2aA?trk=public_profile__posts-text) We’re proud to share that [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_profile__posts-text) has achieved the [Amazon Web Services (AWS)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/amazon-web-services?trk=public_profile__posts-text) Cloud Operations Competency in Monitoring and Observability, a recognition earned by less than 0.1% of AWS Partners worldwide. Alongside this milestone, we launched our Migration Acceleration Service for Amazon CloudWatch, helping enterprises: - Migrate 60% faster - Automate up to 90% of workflows - Unlock AI-powered, cross-account observability A big step forward in our journey to help businesses modernize cloud operations with speed, precision, and confidence. Explore the service on AWS Marketplace: [https://lnkd.in/dHFKrVaB](https://lnkd.in/dHFKrVaB?trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#CrestData](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcrestdata&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#AWSservices](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fawsservices&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#CloudWatch](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcloudwatch&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#Observability](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fobservability&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#CloudOperations](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcloudoperations&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#AITransformation](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Faitransformation&trk=public_profile__posts-text) [#AWS](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Faws&trk=public_profile__posts-text)[...more](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/rishidivate_crest-data-achieves-aws-cloud-operations-activity-7394162375689609216-nkET)[...more](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/rishidivate_crest-data-achieves-aws-cloud-operations-activity-7394162375689609216-nkET)

Excited to connect at KubeCon India 2026 on 18th & 19th June at Jio World Convention Centre! Visit Nutanix at Booth S15 to explore how the Nutanix Kubernetes Platform (NKP) is accelerating application modernization. Organizations are increasingly adopting cloud-native architectures, but managing Kubernetes across on-premises, edge, and cloud environments can be complex. Nutanix Kubernetes Platform (NKP) simplifies this journey with a unified platform that delivers consistent operations, integrated security, automated lifecycle management, and seamless application portability. by reducing operational overhead and providing a scalable, resilient foundation for containers and virtual machines. Nutanix enables customers to modernize applications faster, improve developer productivity, and achieve greater agility while maintaining control over their infrastructure. Look forward to connect with you at our booth # S15 and help and partner with you in your application modernization journey. [Aakanksha Thakkar](https://in.linkedin.com/in/aakanksha-thakkar?trk=public_profile__reactions-text), congratulations on being nominated for the India People Leaders Awards 2026. As HR Manager at HKRP Innovations Limited, your dedication to building strong teams, nurturing talent, and creating a positive workplace culture reflects the significant impact HR leaders have on organizational growth and success. It is inspiring to see professionals who champion employee development, strengthen workplace relationships, and implement people-focused initiatives that help individuals and organizations achieve their full potential. Your contributions play a vital role in creating workplaces where collaboration, innovation, and excellence can thrive. I would also like to encourage professionals across industries, if you are creating impact through people leadership, workforce development, and organizational excellence, this is your opportunity to be recognized. Step forward and nominate yourself. Key Dates: 📌 Nomination Window Closes: 10th June 2026 📌 Jury Review and LinkedIn Engagement: 1st to 12th June 2026 📌 Grand Finale and Gala Night: 20th and 21st June 2026 Selection Process: ✅ 70% Jury Stop by our booth to: - Explore real-world customer success stories and enterprise use cases - Learn about our Quickstart services for Full-stack and LLM observability - Claim a complimentary migration assessment offer If you’re attending DASH 2026 in New York, let’s connect. sections.content:
* [ Aruvasaga chithan A  Zoho • 2K followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/aruvasaga-chithan?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ Zoho just announced Nathu La - their first in-house designed server. It's built for Al, virtualization, storage and high performance workloads. Designed by Zoho, in India . This is a big step toward tech independence and full stack ownership. As someone in cybersecurity, this excites me because owning the infrastructure means more control, more visibility and a stronger foundation for security. Proud moment for Zoho and for Indian tech! #Zoho #Nathula #IndianTech #CyberSecurity  `` `` 5  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/aruvasaga-chithan_zoho-nathula-indiantech-activity-7471776062541058048-IUqY?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)
  * [ Girish M Vyas  RBL Bank • 3K followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/girish-m-vyas?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ 🔐 Day 5/90 – User Provisioning vs Deprovisioning Let me ask you something honestly. Which one is more critical in IAM? 👉 User Provisioning or 👉 User Deprovisioning Most people say provisioning. I disagree. 🧩 What is User Provisioning? Provisioning = Creating user accounts and granting access. When a new employee joins: ✔ Account created in Active Directory / Entra ID ✔ Email configured ✔ Access to applications (CRM, ERP, HRMS, etc.) ✔ Role-based permissions assigned If provisioning is delayed, productivity suffers. But if deprovisioning is delayed? Security suffers. 🚨 What is User Deprovisioning? Deprovisioning = Removing access when someone leaves the organization. This includes: ❌ Disabling Active Directory / Entra ID accounts ❌ Revoking SaaS access (e.g., Salesforce, ServiceNow) ❌ Removing VPN & privileged roles ❌ Rotating shared passwords ❌ Recovering assets This is where most companies fail. 🔎 Real-Life Scenario (Very Common) An employee resigns. HR updates the exit date in the HRMS. But IT is informed 48 hours later. Meanwhile: ⚠ The user still has VPN access ⚠ Still has access to shared drives ⚠ Still has access to client data Now imagine: That employee joins a competitor. This is not a hacker attack. This is an Identity Lifecycle failure. This is exactly what security frameworks like ISO/IEC 27001 and NIST emphasize — timely access revocation. 🎯 Hard Truth in IAM Provisioning impacts productivity. Deprovisioning impacts security, compliance, and reputation. One delayed provisioning ticket = 2 hours of lost work. One delayed deprovisioning = potential data breach. Which one sounds riskier? In IAM, speed of removal defines your security maturity 💡 Pro Tip for IAM Professionals If you're working with: • Microsoft Entra ID • Okta • Active Directory Focus on: ✅ Automated Joiner-Mover-Leaver process ✅ HR-driven identity lifecycle ✅ Immediate account disable on termination ✅ Periodic access reviews Automation > Manual emails. IAM is not about creating accounts. IAM is about controlling access at the right time — and removing it at the right time. 💬 Tell me in comments: In your organization, which process is stronger — provisioning or deprovisioning? #IAM #IdentityManagement #CyberSecurity #ZeroTrust #AccessGovernance #MicrosoftEntra #Okta #ActiveDirectory #PrivilegedAccessManagement #JoinerMoverLeaver #InfoSec #LinkedInLearning  `` `` 22  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/girish-m-vyas_iam-identitymanagement-cybersecurity-activity-7432620467854848000-TjfX?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)

🚀 [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_profile__posts-text) is hiring ! Role: Lead Engineer – Python Experience: 5+ Years Location: San Jose, CA (Hybrid) Industry: IT Services ✨ What You’ll Do: • Architect and develop robust, scalable software solutions. • Collaborate seamlessly across interdisciplinary teams. • Implement cutting-edge methodologies for superior performance. • Own end-to-end project delivery, from requirement gathering to final release. ✔️ What We’re Looking For: • Proficiency in Core Python, Rest API development, and Django/Flask frameworks • Expertise in Multithreading & Multiprocessing • Strong OOPs, Data Structures, and RESTful services development skills. • Familiarity with Agile methodology and customer-facing roles. 🛂 Visa Status Requirement: Open to candidates with H1B, Green Card, or U.S. Citizenship only. What We Offer: • Hybrid work environment based in San Jose, CA. • Competitive salary and excellent benefits package. 📩 Ready to take the lead? sections.heading: Crest Data
sections.content:
8mo 
[ Ronak Shah liked this  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/crest-data_crestdata-dynatrace-observability-activity-7379141804841058305-oQu2)
🚀 BIG NEWS! [Dynatrace](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dynatrace?trk=public_profile__reactions-text) and [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_profile__reactions-text) have formed a strategic partnership to streamline and accelerate your move to modern observability! Tired of complex, costly migrations from traditional log management solutions? Together, we're delivering future-ready migrations that simplify your transition to the Dynatrace AI-powered Observability platform. Key Benefits of our joint solution: ⚡️ Accelerated Migration: Automated conversion of dashboards and alerts. 💡 Expert-Level Resources: Deep in-house expertise with both Splunk and Dynatrace ensures a seamless transition. 📈 Enterprise-Scale Observability & AI: Leverage Dynatrace Grail for high-volume data ingestion and unified visibility, powered by Davis AI for real-time, automated insights and faster issue resolution. 👉 To learn more, read the full announcement here: [https://lnkd.in/d4A-_m5Y](https://lnkd.in/d4A-_m5Y?trk=public_profile__reactions-text) Learn more about Splunk to Dynatrace Migration Services by [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_profile__reactions-text) [https://lnkd.in/d9K6SsCt](https://lnkd.in/d9K6SsCt?trk=public_profile__reactions-text) [#CrestData](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcrestdata&trk=public_profile__reactions-text) [#Dynatrace](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fdynatrace&trk=public_profile__reactions-text) [#Observability](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fobservability&trk=public_profile__reactions-text) [#Migration](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fmigration&trk=public_profile__reactions-text) [#Enterprise](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fenterprise&trk=public_profile__reactions-text) [#AIOps](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Faiops&trk=public_profile__reactions-text)
