sections.heading: Explore more posts
sections.content:
* [ Nishil Parekh  Crefio • 7K followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/nishilparekh?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ Imagine this... “Hey ChatGPT, pay my electricity bill.” “Order me a pizza and pay for it.” That can actually be real. National Payments Corporation Of India (NPCI) and Razorpay just launched a pilot that lets ChatGPT handle UPI payments no app, no checkout. Just words. We’ve officially entered a world where you don’t click or tap to pay, you talk. Places like China already have payments with fingerprints. With the AI agents launched by ChatGPT recently, This is an Insane use-case in fintech. Because this isn’t just a tech upgrade, it’s a behaviour shift. We used to trust banks. Then we trusted apps. Now, we’re about to trust AI with our money. AI is going to change how we deal with money. Maybe we could have a Jarvis like Iron man for everyone. The question is we as users will adopt something like this?  `` `` 31  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 6 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/nishilparekh_imagine-this-hey-chatgpt-pay-my-electricity-activity-7382001462920376321-k2up?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)
  * [ Metla Pavan  3K followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/metla-pavan-43667615a?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ ₹100 Cr to ₹1,500 Cr in 12 months. That's 15x return on a single investment. The Bear House is Namita Thapar's most profitable Shark Tank India deal 👇 Namita Thapar made 137 offers. Closed 111 deals. Deployed ₹48.6 Cr. But one brand stood out. Bear House. ₹1 Cr was invested. 1% equity. ₹100 Cr valuation. 12 months later? ₹1,500 Cr valuation. New round incoming. Here's how The Bear House grew so fast 👇. The Product: Premium menswear. Smart casuals. European designs. Indian pricing. 420 GSM fabric. 30% thicker than competitors. Shirts are priced at ₹1,500-₹3,000. Quality of Louis Philippe. Price of Zara. No compromise. No shortcuts. The Marketing: Zero celebrity ads. Zero heavy spends. Only 6-7% of the marketing budget. Their strategy? Let the product speak.Word of mouth. Customer reviews. Organic content. That's it. When your product is good, customers become marketers. The Numbers: FY18: ₹2 Cr in revenue. FY24: ₹96.5 Cr in revenue. FY25: ₹140 Cr. Monthly revenue: ₹9 Cr → ₹25 Cr after Shark Tank. 40% YoY growth. Profitable since day one. The Distribution: Started D2C. Website only. Now? #Myntra is #1 in casual shirts. Live on #Flipkart, #Ajio, #Amazon, #Nykaa, and #Tata Cliq. 14 offline stores. Delhi. Bengaluru. Hyderabad. More coming. Even #Zepto sells The Bear House now. Quick commerce meets fashion. What Worked: → Product quality over ad spends. → D2C model cut middlemen costs. → 7,800 SKUs. 100+ new styles every month. → Premium positioning at mid-range pricing. → Omnichannel expansion at the right time. Founders Harsh and Tanvi Somaiya started this in 2017. No investors. Just focus on fabric and fit. Namita Thapar saw the product. Backed the founders. Simple. Namita's Return (My Assumption): Investment: ₹1 Cr for 1% equity at a ₹100 Cr valuation. New round expected at ₹1,500. Cr. Her 1% stake is now worth ₹15 Cr. Profit: ₹14 Cr on a ₹1 Cr investment. Return: 15x in 12 months. Not confirmed yet. But if this round closes, this becomes one of the best Shark Tank returns ever. Namita's Formula: She said, "For me, the most important is the founder. The hunger. The humility." She doesn't chase hype. She backs people who build quality. The Bear House. #Arata. #Janitri. Her top 3 picks. All growing. All profitable. Indian consumers are changing. They don't want cheap anymore. They want quality at fair prices. The Bear House understood this. Built for it. Won because of it. #SharkTankIndia #NamitaThapar #BearHouse #StartupIndia #D2CBrands #MarketingStrategy  `` `` 441  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 13 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/metla-pavan-43667615a_myntra-flipkart-ajio-activity-7435685751394222080-neB4?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)
  * [ Vinay Mundhe  TEKsystems Global Services in… • 439 followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/vinaymundhe?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ If your entire portfolio is in the Indian rupee, you are losing money. The rupee vs dollar has fallen almost every decade. Inflation keeps rising. Imports get costlier. And your savings silently lose strength. The only solution to this is that you can hold USD assets. This gives you: • USD appreciation • U.S. market returns This protects your future purchasing power. I'm increasing my U.S. exposure to ~30% of my portfolio and will rebalance when needed.  `` `` ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/vinaymundhe_if-your-entire-portfolio-is-in-the-indian-activity-7404397204620103681-oQKi?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)
  * [ Varshath Gupta  Extenda Retail • 1K followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/varshathgupta?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ Ever noticed how Rameshwaram Cafe handles 1000's of people without a single mistake? You walk in. It’s chaos. Crowd everywhere. Orders flying. But somehow… zero confusion. Here’s what’s actually happening 👇 🔁 The System Behind the Madness You pay at the counter → (Request sent) You get a token → (Acknowledgement received) You move aside → (Queue formed) Kitchen prepares your food → (Async processing) Your number is called → (Response delivered) At no point are you blocking the counter waiting for your dosa. ⚙️ That’s Literally How Message Queues Work Think: Apache Kafka RabbitMQ Instead of making users wait, systems: Accept requests instantly Push them into a queue Let workers process them in the background 🚀 Why This Matters Without this pattern: ❌ One slow task = entire system stuck ❌ Traffic spike = system crash ❌ Users rage quit With async + queues: ✅ Smooth traffic handling ✅ Better scalability ✅ Faster user experience 🔥 Final Thought If a crowded Bangalore cafe can scale flawlessly with tokens… Why is your backend still making users wait? 👀 #SystemDesign #DistributedSystems #AsyncProcessing #MessageQueues #TechExplained #BangaloreTech  `` `` 11  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 2 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/varshathgupta_systemdesign-distributedsystems-asyncprocessing-activity-7445116382578589696-b2wk?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)
  * [ Souvik Misra  ConnectWise • 534 followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/souvikmisra?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ 🚀 FROM ₹2 LAKH TO ₹1.8 CRORE: A 35-Year Investment Story That Will Change How You Think About Wealth Here's the fascinating breakdown 👇 THE EXPERIMENT: On January 2, 1990, split ₹2 lakh equally: • ₹1 lakh → S&P 500 (USA) 🇺🇸 • ₹1 lakh → BSE SENSEX (India) 🇮🇳 Redeem on November 27, 2025. THE RESULTS (after all taxes, brokerage, and expenses): 📊 S&P 500 Performance: → Final Value: ₹87,10,973 → ROI: 8,611% (87x return) → CAGR: 13.61% → Index growth: 359.69 → 6,812.61 📈 BSE SENSEX Performance: → Final Value: ₹92,64,825 → ROI: 9,165% (92.6x return) → CAGR: 13.88% → Index growth: ~800 → 85,847 🏆 Total Portfolio Value: ₹1,79,75,798 WINNER: BSE SENSEX (by ₹5.5 lakhs) 🎯 BUT WAIT... WHAT ABOUT INFLATION? 💰 India's cumulative inflation (1990-2025): 955% This means ₹1 lakh in 1990 = ₹10.55 lakh purchasing power in 2025. Inflation-Adjusted Real Returns: • S&P 500: ₹8.26 lakhs (7.3x real gain) • SENSEX: ₹8.78 lakhs (7.8x real gain) Both investments didn't just beat inflation—they CRUSHED it! 💪 🔑 KEY INSIGHTS FOR TODAY'S INVESTORS: 1️⃣ Time in Market > Timing the Market 35 years of staying invested through crashes (2000, 2008, 2020) delivered life-changing returns. 2️⃣ India's Growth Story delivered despite rupee depreciation (₹17.50 → ₹89.39 per USD), SENSEX outperformed the world's most robust market. 3️⃣ Compounding is Magical ~13.7% annual returns transformed ₹2 lakh into ₹1.8 crore. That's the power of patience. 4️⃣ Diversification Reduces Risk Geographic + currency diversification protected against single-market shocks. 5️⃣ Equities Beat Everything Long-Term FDs would've given you ₹16-20 lakhs. Equities gave you ₹1.8 CRORE. 6️⃣ Inflation is Your Silent Enemy Your money needs to grow faster than 7% annually just to maintain purchasing power. 7️⃣ Tax Efficiency Matters India's 12.5% LTCG tax vs US's 20% made a meaningful difference. 📌 THE MILLION-RUPEE QUESTION: If you had ₹2 lakh TODAY, would you invest it? Most people would hesitate. But this data shows that: ✅ The best time to invest was 35 years ago ✅ The second-best time is RIGHT NOW 🎯 WHAT THIS MEANS FOR YOU: Whether you're 25 or 55, the principles remain: • Start investing early • Choose diversified equity portfolios • Stay invested through volatility • Think long-term (10+ years minimum) • Don't let inflation erode your wealth The next 35 years will create new millionaires. Will you be one of them? Drop a comment below—I'd love to hear your takeaway from this analysis! 👇 And if you found this valuable, hit that share button. Someone in your network needs to see this. 🔄 #Investing #WealthCreation #StockMarket #FinancialFreedom #PersonalFinance #MoneyManagement #InvestmentStrategy #CompoundInterest #FinancialWisdom #MoneyMatters #InvestorMindset #BuildWealth Disclaimer: This analysis is for educational purposes only. Consult a qualified financial advisor before making investment decisions. Data Sources: BSE, S&P Global, RBI, Federal Reserve, World Bank  `` `` 19  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 2 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/souvikmisra_investing-wealthcreation-stockmarket-activity-7400134247073681408-WU6u?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)
  * [ Bhavya Kaur  Groto • 3K followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/bhavyakaur?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ This company replaced 700 workers with AI - and didn’t hire a single engineer. 🤯 This isn’t a prediction. It already happened. This company? Klarna — a ₹55,000 crore fintech giant in Europe. No layoffs warning. No big AI lab. Just ChatGPT. A product manager. And one scary-good automation flow. In 3 months, their AI: -> Took over 2.3M support chats/week -> Responded 5x faster than humans -> Delivered ₹1000 crore in cost savings -> Replaced 700 people -> Didn’t need a single engineer to build Not because humans failed. Because the bot was just better. Still thinking: “I’m safe because I’m creative”? “I work with clients, not tickets”? Think again. If a customer rep can be replaced by a no-code GPT agent... what stops it from replacing: Your onboarding DMs? Your design briefs? Your entire delivery workflow? Not in 2030. Now. You don’t need to learn AI. You need to outrun it. Because this isn’t just Klarna’s story. It’s a trailer for ours. Still feel ahead of the curve? Or just praying the curve doesn’t hit you first? #AI #layoffs #chatgpt  `` `` 13  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 7 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/bhavyakaur_ai-layoffs-chatgpt-activity-7371863932401025025-YUKA?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)
  * [ Aamar Srivastava  Your Second Salary • 6K followers ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/coachamarpratap?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ Lenskart IPO: Hype ya Trap? Retail investors are jumping in… but the real numbers paint a very different picture. Growth HALF ho chuki hai, profit sirf paper pe hai, aur IPO ka maximum paisa founders aur early investors exit ke liye jaa raha hai. Before you invest, watch this breakdown. No bias. No hype. Sirf facts, data, aur reality. 🔥 Finance + Investing breakdowns daily 🔥 IPO Analysis | Stock Insights | Money Psychology Follow for more: #LenskartIPO #IPOAlert #MarketTruth #InvestmentTips #FinanceWithAamar #CoachAamarSrivastava #AamarSrivastava #AmarPratapSrivastava  `` `` 6  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 2 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/coachamarpratap_lenskartipo-ipoalert-markettruth-activity-7396781015580512257-dlsR?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)

sections.heading: Team Talent Acquisition at Crest Data.ai
sections.content:
[ ](https://www.linkedin.com/login?emailAddress=&fromSignIn=&session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fin.linkedin.com%2Fin%2Frohit-j-248a64252&trk=public_jobs_message-the-recruiter-cta)
**Location: Pune/ Ahmedabad**
  

**About the Role**
  

We’re hiring someone to design and build **AI-native, multi-agent workflows** across a suite of AI-native products in cybersecurity and reliability engineering. This person will sit at the intersection of **product thinking, AI systems design, workflow orchestration, and enterprise integrations.**
You will help define how autonomous and semi-autonomous agents collaborate, reason, retrieve context, call tools, and take action
This is a hands-on builder role for someone who can go from **problem framing → workflow design → agent architecture → production implementation.**
  

**What you’ll do**
  

• Design and implement **AI-native multi-agent workflows** for cybersecurity and SRE use cases
• Define how agents collaborate across tasks such as planning, retrieval, reasoning, execution, verification, escalation, and summarization
• Build agentic systems that can interact with:
o internal product capabilities
o third-party APIs
o security tools
o observability and incident systems
o knowledge bases and structured/unstructured data
• Create robust orchestration patterns for:
o tool calling
o state management
o memory and context handling
o human-in-the-loop checkpoints
o fallback and recovery behavior
• Work closely with product, engineering, design, security SMEs, and customers to turn ambiguous workflows into production-grade AI capabilities
• Prototype rapidly, evaluate performance, and productionize successful patterns
• Design workflows for high-value use cases such as:
o SOC alert triage and investigation
o incident correlation and root cause analysis
o remediation recommendations and action execution
o runbook automation
o cross-product enrichment and case summarization
o integration-led automations across cybersecurity stacks
• Define quality standards for agent behavior including accuracy, explainability, observability, guardrails, and failure handling
• Contribute to the product roadmap by identifying where agentic workflows can create real user value
  

**What we’re looking for**
• 3-5+ years in product engineering, solutions architecture, workflow automation, AI applications, or related roles
• Strong experience building**LLM-powered applications or agentic systems** in production
• Experience designing multi-step workflows that combine reasoning, re**trieval, API/tool use, and action execution**
• Strong understanding of one or more of the following:
o cybersecurity workflows
o SOC operations
o SRE / incident management / observability
o enterprise integration platforms
• Ability to translate messy real-world operator workflows into elegant productized systems
• Experience with orchestration frameworks, agent frameworks, or custom workflow engines
• Strong coding ability in Python, Typescript, or similar
• Familiarity with APIs, event-driven systems, connectors, and systems integration
• Comfort working across product design, architecture, and implementation
• Strong written communication and systems thinking
•
**Preferred qualifications**
• Experience with SIEM, SOAR, EDR, vulnerability management, threat intel, ticketing, or case management products
• Experience with observability platforms, incident response tooling, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, or platform engineering systems
• Experience building internal copilots, AI assistants, or autonomous workflows for technical users
• Familiarity with evaluation methods for LLM/agent quality, including latency, hallucination risk, task success, and safety
• Experience with RAG, memory design, planning systems, and workflow state machines
• Exposure to security and compliance requirements in enterprise environments
• Startup or zero-to-one product-building experience
  

  

**Good-to-have tech platforms, frameworks, and tooling**
• Hands-on experience with some of the following is a strong plus:
• **LangGraph / LangChain** for stateful, graph-based agent workflows and tool-calling patterns
• **ClaudeSDK** for enterprise-grade multi-agent orchestration
• **CrewAI** for role-based multi-agent coordination and task delegation patterns, including production deployment options through managed runtimes
• **LlamaIndex** or **Haystack** for retrieval-heavy workflows, knowledge-grounded agents, and document-aware reasoning patterns
• Familiarity with **MCP (Model Context Protocol) and A2A-style interoperability** for connecting agents to tools, services, and other agents in a standardized way
• Experience with model platforms such as **OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS Bedrock, or Google Vertex AI**
• Familiarity with model routing, fallback strategies, latency/cost optimization, and eval-driven model selection
• Experience building with **event-driven architectures,** queues, webhooks, and integration middleware
• Vector and hybrid retrieval systems such as Pinecone**, Weaviate, Elasticsearch, or OpenSearch**
• Experience with **RAG architectures,** re-ranking, knowledge stores, cache layers, and short-term/long-term agent memory
• Working knowledge of **Postgres, Redis,** object storage, and document processing pipelines
• **OpenTelemetry** for tracing, telemetry, and workflow observability across agent/tool chains
• Familiarity with agent/LLM evaluation approaches: task success, hallucination detection, latency, cost, safety, and regression testing
• Experience with prompt/version management, replay, auditability, and failure analysis
• Understanding of **guardrails, policy checks, agent governance, audit logging, and secure runtime controls for autonomous systems;** this is becoming increasingly important as agent frameworks move into production use
  

**You may be a fit if you**
• Think in terms of systems,**workflows, and outcomes** , not just prompts
• Can design when to use a single agent, when to use multiple agents, and when not to use agents at all
• Understand that production **AI needs guardrails, observability, and deterministic fallbacks**
• Enjoy working on hard operational domains with messy data and real consequences
• Can move fluidly between whiteboarding architecture and shipping code
• Care deeply about user trust, actionability, and measurable business impact
  

**Success in this role looks like**
• Shipping agentic workflows that users trust and adopt
• Reducing time-to-triage, time-to-resolution, and manual operational effort
• Creating reusable workflow patterns across product lines
• Balancing autonomy with control in sensitive operational environments
• Turning AI from a demo feature into a core product capability
  

**Why join us**
You’ll help shape how AI-native products are built for high-stakes technical domains. This role is ideal for someone who wants to define the future of **agentic product** experiences in cybersecurity and reliability engineering, while working on real customer problems and production-scale systems.

sections.heading: Team Talent Acquisition at Crest Data.ai
sections.content:
[ ](https://www.linkedin.com/login?emailAddress=&fromSignIn=&session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fin.linkedin.com%2Fin%2Frohit-j-248a64252&trk=public_jobs_message-the-recruiter-cta)
Crest Data is the global leading provider of Data Analytics, Security, DevOps, Cloud Solutions, Software integrations, Analytics, and security-based technological services. With a clientele that includes several Fortune 500 corporations and some of the innovative Silicon Valley Startups.
  

**Company URL:** http://www.crestdata.ai
  

We are expanding our India operations & looking for strong SOC Analysts to join our IT infrastructure team in Ahmedabad. The primary responsibility will be to help manage, design, and develop Enterprise security for our organization. We have global Fortune 500 clients in Data Analytics, Security, and Cloud segments. The job requires an understanding of at least one of the technologies such as Data Analytics (Splunk, Elastic Search, Apache Spark, Hadoop), Software Defined Networking (Cisco ACI, VMware NSX), Security (Endpoint, SOAR, Analytics), Cloud Providers (AWS, Azure) etc.
  

  

**Key Responsibilities :**
  * Security Fundamentals: A solid understanding of cybersecurity principles, including network and endpoint security.
  * Threat Detection: Ability to recognize and analyze patterns of suspicious activities and potential security threats by analyzing logs and alerts generated by different systems such Firewall, Directory services, EDR/XDR software, DLP solution, Email gateway etc.
  * Network Protocols: Understanding of TCP/IP networking protocols, packet analysis, and firewall logs to identify and respond to network-based threats.
  * VAPT: Familiarity with vulnerability scanning tools and techniques to identify weaknesses in systems and networks. Should have hands-on expirence on Penetration testing of various Servers, Web applications and Mobile applications.
  * Endpoint Security: Experience with endpoint detection and response (EDR) tools and techniques to monitor and respond to threats on endpoints (Laptops and Servers).
  * Darkweb Monitoring: Should have hands-on expirence on darkweb monitoring. Individual should be well versed with the various dark web sources, including forums, marketplaces, and chat rooms, where cybercriminals buy, sell, and exchange information and tools.
  * Security Certifications: Certifications such as CompTIA Security+, CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) or Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP) preferred.
  * Analytical Skills: Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills to investigate security incidents, identify root causes, and recommend corrective actions.
  * Communication Skills: Effective communication skills to collaborate with other team members, document incidents, and communicate effectively with stakeholders at various technical levels.
  * Compliance requirements: Must have a thorough understanding of applicable regulations, such as ISO 27001, SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI etc. Should have proven track record of compliance related activities in the organization.
  * Continuous Learning: A willingness to continuously learn in the feild of Cyber security about new threats, technologies, and best practices is essential.
  * Proficiency in SIEM tools such as Splunk, Wazuh or ELK Stack to analyze and correlate security events is a plus.


Show more  Show less

sections.content:
[ ![View profile for Devanshi Raichura](https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D5603AQGC_Xl_BUQ1jg/profile-displayphoto-scale_400_400/B56Z4dAIxuKEAg-/0/1778603037345?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=dW_3Yv7Z170tnQrEoig_zTsZpQX1MnBYJISf1_8_mi4) ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/devanshi-raichura-80673a40?trk=public_post_feed-actor-image)
[ Devanshi Raichura ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/devanshi-raichura-80673a40?trk=public_post_feed-actor-name)
1mo  Edited 
  * [ Report this post ](https://www.linkedin.com/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fposts%2Fdevanshi-raichura-80673a40_hiring-financeleadership-ipoready-activity-7453073020488736768-I5iW&trk=public_post_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=POST&_f=guest-reporting)


We at [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_post-text) are looking to connect with a seasoned Associate Director / Director – Finance who can help us build for scale, bring sharper financial governance, and partner closely as we prepare for our next phase of growth (including IPO readiness). This role will work closely with the CFO and the Founders, [Malhar Shah](https://www.linkedin.com/in/malhar?trk=public_post-text) & [Neha Shah](https://in.linkedin.com/in/neha-shah-2306363b9?trk=public_post-text) What we’re looking for: • CA qualification • 10+ years of experience in finance leadership • Hands-on experience with IPO preparation / readiness • Strong depth in due diligence and financial governance If you enjoy building with intent, navigating complexity, and being part of a journey where your work truly moves the needle — this could be a great fit. If this sounds like you (or someone you’d strongly recommend), I’d love to connect. 📩 [rabindra.mishra@crestdata.ai](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=mailto%3Arabindra%2Emishra%40crestdata%2Eai&urlhash=d2sd&trk=public_post-text) [#Hiring](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fhiring&trk=public_post-text) [#FinanceLeadership](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ffinanceleadership&trk=public_post-text) [#IPOReady](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fipoready&trk=public_post-text) [#CrestData](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcrestdata&trk=public_post-text) [#LeadershipHiring](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fleadershiphiring&trk=public_post-text) [#FinanceCareers](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ffinancecareers&trk=public_post-text)

[#Hiring](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fhiring&trk=public_post-text) AI/ML Engineers at [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_post-text). Experience: 3+ years Tech Stack: Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, NumPy, Pandas Location: Ahmedabad Know anyone who matches the requirement? Apply below or reach out to me at [shweta.popat@crestdata.ai](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=mailto%3Ashweta%2Epopat%40crestdata%2Eai&urlhash=LBWa&trk=public_post-text) [#MachineLearning](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fmachinelearning&trk=public_post-text) [#AI](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fai&trk=public_post-text) [#GenAI](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fgenai&trk=public_post-text) [#LLM](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fllm&trk=public_post-text) [#TeamCrest](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fteamcrest&trk=public_post-text) [Riddhi Kansara](https://in.linkedin.com/in/riddhi-kansara-b9aa5a70?trk=public_post-text) [Hardik dwivedi](https://in.linkedin.com/in/hardik-dwivedi-059191b6?trk=public_post-text) [Pratik Trivedi](https://au.linkedin.com/in/pratikgtrivedi?trk=public_post-text) [Devanshi Raichura](https://in.linkedin.com/in/devanshi-raichura-80673a40?trk=public_post-text) [Vidhi Gandhi](https://in.linkedin.com/in/vidhi-gandhi-b448b4108?trk=public_post-text) [Sagar Bhagchandani](https://in.linkedin.com/in/sagarbhagchandani35?trk=public_post-text) [Yash Somani](https://in.linkedin.com/in/yash-somani-05502ab2?trk=public_post-text) [Rutva Sanghvi](https://in.linkedin.com/in/rutva-sanghvi?trk=public_post-text)

sections.content:
[ ![View profile for Yash Somani](https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D03AQERyWzO6Oc5gw/profile-displayphoto-shrink_400_400/B4DZW4m6sbHYAg-/0/1742558965719?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=PJEyNSn3ewgqf7wK2irnO8ODkOS4wVm9G7a7whXx_64) ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/yash-somani-05502ab2?trk=public_post_feed-actor-image)
[ Yash Somani ](https://in.linkedin.com/in/yash-somani-05502ab2?trk=public_post_feed-actor-name)
1y 
  * [ Report this post ](https://www.linkedin.com/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fposts%2Fyash-somani-05502ab2_hiring-technicalsupportengineer-ahmedabadjobs-activity-7337807768810106880-u8lT&trk=public_post_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=POST&_f=guest-reporting)


🚨 [Crest Data](https://www.linkedin.com/company/crest-data?trk=public_post-text) is Hiring – Technical Support Engineer🚨 📍 Location: Ahmedabad 🧑💻 Experience: 1–3 Years ⏱️ Shifts & Weekends: Rotational We’re looking for a Technical Support Engineer with strong fundamentals in Linux, SQL, Application Support, Troubleshooting, and Network Protocols. If you also bring knowledge of AWS, Azure, scripting, or syslog, that’s a big plus! 🛠️ What You’ll Do: • Own and resolve customer technical issues end-to-end • Diagnose and troubleshoot application/network-related problems • Collaborate with internal teams for escalations • Maintain accurate logs, reports, and documentation • Ensure timely response and resolution as per SLAs 🎯 Must-Have Skills: ✔️ Linux & troubleshooting fundamentals ✔️ SQL & application support experience ✔️ Strong communication skills ✔️ Customer-focused problem-solving mindset ✔️ Understanding of network protocols 🧠 Good to Have: AWS / Azure fundamentals, Scripting skills, Syslog exposure 📩 Interested or know someone perfect for this? Share your resume at [yash.somani@crestdata.ai](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=mailto%3Ayash%2Esomani%40crestdata%2Eai&urlhash=nG4c&trk=public_post-text) or DM me directly! [#Hiring](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fhiring&trk=public_post-text) [#TechnicalSupportEngineer](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ftechnicalsupportengineer&trk=public_post-text) [#AhmedabadJobs](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fahmedabadjobs&trk=public_post-text) [#Linux](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Flinux&trk=public_post-text) [#SQL](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fsql&trk=public_post-text) [#AWS](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Faws&trk=public_post-text) [#ApplicationSupport](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fapplicationsupport&trk=public_post-text) [#TechSupport](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Ftechsupport&trk=public_post-text) [#ITJobs](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fitjobs&trk=public_post-text) [#SupportEngineer](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fsupportengineer&trk=public_post-text) [#CareerOpportunity](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Ffeed%2Fhashtag%2Fcareeropportunity&trk=public_post-text)
